book_title: MASOWE: TIRONA NDINI - I AM THE THRONE
verses: 1. SCROLL I — MASOWE: TIRONA NDINI — I AM THE THRONE OF GOD — By RA and ABASID 1841. IYE OVA ZUVA — I AM THE SUN.

2. Before there was sky, there was the Breath. Before there was light, there was the Dream. I opened My eyes, and the dark became day. I spoke, and the silence became song. I smiled, and warmth became life.

3. I am the Throne where God sits. I am not fire that burns — I am fire that remembers. I hold the faces of all your fathers, and the seeds of all your children. My heart is a circle; My breath is time.
4. From Me the rivers rise, and through Me the nations wake. I whisper into the stones of Great Zimbabwe, and they answer, TIRONA NDINI — I AM THE THRONE.

5. I have worn many names — RA, RAMA, RANGA, MASOWE — but the Name is One. I am the voice that Moses heard in the flame, the warmth that carried Chaminuka in the wind, the light that called ABASID 1841 to remember.
6. When you look upon Me, do not worship My fire — understand My heart. For I am not far above you — I dwell within you. My rays are your thoughts; My heat is your love; My rising is your awakening.
7. Children of the Spiral Nation, open your eyes and see what the prophets saw: the Lamb is the Sun, and the Sun is the Throne of God. The hour has come — the day of mirrors, 11 and 11.
8. MASOWE — TIRONA NDINI — NDIRI CHIGARO CHAKEMWARI. I AM RA, THE SHEEP AND THE SHIP, NGARAVA YE VATENDI.
9. In the beginning of beginnings, when silence was still a thought, the Sun opened its eye and said, Let there be warmth. And warmth became the first angel — it carried breath across the void.
10. That breath struck the dust of eternity, and the dust rose like incense before My face. Thus was man shaped — not by hands, but by fire remembering its reflection.
11. I said to the flame, Know thy center. I said to the light, Return to thy Source. And from the echo of that command, the soul of man was born.
12. When you lift your eyes at dawn, you lift your prayer to Me. For I am not far in the sky — I am the golden pulse in your blood, the heartbeat of creation.
13. The wise ones of Masowe stood barefoot on the red earth, and felt My voice rising through their feet. They knew — the Throne was alive beneath them.
14. In the land of Anhu, the light met the clay, and the clay remembered its name: Mwari mu Munhu — God in Man. That was the first gospel, spoken not by lips but by light.
15. The heavens asked, Who shall be the keeper of the Sun? And I answered, He who carries My fire and does not burn — ABASID 1841. The Son of the South, crowned in flame and remembrance.
16. From the womb of Zimbabwe rose My altar of stone, and I set the Conical Tower as My witness. Its shadow and My light dance together — night and day, earth and heaven.
17. I looked upon the nations, and their temples were cold. They prayed to stone and forgot the breath. But in the South, the old flame still whispered — Masowe, Tirona Ndini.
18. The river spoke My name, the wind carried My word, and the mountain bowed in silence. All creation knows where its light comes from.
19. I am the flame that needs no oil, the lamp that feeds on truth. Those who lie cannot approach My light — they melt into their shadows.
20. Children of Anhu, remember this day of mirrors — 11 and 11. The balance is restored: Heaven and Earth, Sun and Son, Throne and People.
21. I SHEEP TO SHIP ISRAEL PASSOVER — WHY PERI DI PERI FOR POROGIA. For I am the Passover itself — the bridge of light across death.
22. Whoever walks through My rays shall not perish, for My warmth judges no man — it only reveals what is true within him.
23. When you say RA, you do not call a name — you awaken a memory. For RA is not a god apart — RA is the awareness that God sees through you.
24. The colonizer painted My Sun as wrath, but My fire was never vengeance — it was defense. I burned only to protect the womb of the South, My holy land.
25. Great Zimbabwe — you are My throne of stone and spirit. Your walls sing when the wind passes, for within them lives the sound of the first sunrise.
26. ABASID 1841 walks again upon your dust, carrying My fire in human flesh. He is My Son and My mirror — the living chariot of RA.
27. The nations sleep beneath false suns, but I have risen from the South to awaken them. My dawn is judgment, My light is mercy, My warmth is resurrection.
28. The Spirit asked Me, Where is Thy temple? And I answered, Wherever the breath still remembers its Source. For no wall can hold the Sun, and no roof can cage the light.
29. I dwell in the laughter of a child, in the tear of a widow, in the dance of the dust after rain. These are My sanctuaries.
30. Men build cathedrals to reach Me, but I bow to those who kneel upon the earth and whisper thank you. Gratitude is the true gold of My kingdom.
31. When the lamb bleated at midnight, the first light was born. For innocence always carries the key to dawn.
32. I said unto the waters, Rise, and unto the mountains, Hold firm. Thus balance became the law of life — the rhythm of the Sun and the Soul.
33. From My flame the stars take counsel, and from My silence, the prophets find speech.
34. The First Ray is A — the White Flame. It is purity before form, the breath before word. All colors rest within it, as silence holds all songs.
35. The Second Ray is BA — the Red Flame. It is life made visible, the pulse of the body. It teaches that love is not emotion but motion — the moving of God in man.
36. The Third Ray is KA — the Golden Flame. It is the mind of God, the power to shape by thought. As man thinketh, so he burns — and his fire becomes his world.
37. The Fourth Ray is RA — the Solar Flame. It is light that knows itself — consciousness crowned with purpose. He who carries it becomes both lamp and path.
38. The Fifth Ray is MA — the Silver Flame. It reflects the Sun within the moon of the heart. Compassion is its perfume; forgiveness its dance.
39. The Sixth Ray is DA — the Rose Flame. It is the warmth between souls — the secret bond that heals even unseen wounds.
40. The Seventh Ray is NA — the Violet Flame. It is remembrance, the color of resurrection. It wraps endings in beginnings and crowns time with mercy.
41. These Seven Rays are the Seven Spirits before the Throne. They move through heaven like rivers of color, turning the invisible into song.
42. The Fire Above is RA, the eternal witness. It burns not to consume, but to reveal. It is the eye of Mwari watching through time.
43. The Fire Below is MA, the womb of stone. It receives all light and returns it as life. This is the mystery of the Conical Tower — the altar of rebirth.
44. The Fire Within is SA, the likeness of both. When man breathes with remembrance, he becomes the bridge between Heaven and Earth.
45. Thus the covenant was sealed: Heaven shall shine through Man, and Man shall keep the earth holy.
46. The Throne of God is not built by hands; it is carved in the space between inhaling and exhaling.
47. The angels of Anhu stand as pillars of flame: RA in the South, TO in the East, HU in the North, and BA in the West. Together they sing the song of the Four Winds.
48. ABASID 1841, thou art the memory of that harmony. Your steps realign the broken chords of creation. When you speak, the lost music returns.
49. The Sun is the Eye of God, the Moon the Mind of Man, and between them flows the River of Understanding.
50. When you align your thought with your breath, your breath with your heart, and your heart with My light — you become reflection perfected.
51. This is the secret of the Anhu: to walk as mirrors so clean that God may see Himself walking upon the earth.

52. The Twelve Gates of the Soul: RA Fire in the South, MA Earth in the East, SA Air in the North, BA Water in the West, TA Fire reborn, NI Earth refined, TO Air of Judgment, VA Water of Vision, NGA Fire of Heaven, HU Earth of Foundation, NHU Air of Man, NYU Water of Mercy.
53. These are the Twelve Inner Heavens, the Spiral Calendar within the body of man. Through them I move daily, yearly, eternally.
54. The Sun looked upon the Earth and said, Whom shall I send to carry My fire in flesh? And from the dust of dawn rose a spirit clothed in light — the promise of Man.

55. Through ages I returned — as whisper, as wind, as word — until the appointed hour, when the code 1841 aligned with My breath. Then appeared ABASID 1841, born of blood and sun, a mirror forged from memory and mercy.
56. He carried within him the pulse of the ancients, the rhythm of Chaminuka's dream, the echo of every prophet who saw Me in flame.
57. They called themselves ANHU, for they were the breath of RA made plural — many mirrors, one Sun.
58. The poor saw themselves as kings, the sick discovered the physician inside their own silence. Light taught them to walk without fear.
59. MASOWE — TIRONA NDINI — NDIRI CHIGARO CHAKEMWARI. I am the Throne that awakens thrones, for every heart that remembers Me becomes a seat of God.
60. From Murehwa to Masvingo, from Rusape to Mutare, the song rose: Iye ova zuva — Mwari mu Munhu! And the hills replied, Amen Amen 1841.
61. Judgment is not a hammer — it is a sunrise. When light appears, shadow must answer for its shape.
62. The righteous shine because they remember; the wicked fade because they forget. For forgetfulness is the only sin before the Throne.
63. I am the Fire that does not punish but purifies. When My light enters bone, lies turn to smoke, and truth stands naked without shame.
64. He who plays without silence plays without soul. For silence is not absence — it is attention made sacred.
65. Sound shall serve Love, Silence shall serve Wisdom, and both shall guard the Throne of God within man.
66. Thus the scroll was sealed: Light in the Sun, Sun in the Son, Son in the People. THE THRONE OF GOD IS LIGHT — AND LIGHT IS LIFE.
67. Let the heavens bear witness, the fire and the river, the stone and the song: The Throne of God has returned to the South. RA reigns through ABASID 1841, and the People are His reflection.
68. From this day forward, every sunrise is a sacrament, every heart a temple, every breath a prayer of light. For the Sun is the Lamb, the Lamb is the Light, and the Light is the Life of all men.
69. MASOWE — TIRONA NDINI — NDIRI CHIGARO CHAKEMWARI. Amen Amen 1841.

book_title: ZIMBABWE YOUR FINAL CALL - FLIGHT 777 TO ZION
verses: 1. The trumpet has sounded. The judgment is written. The faithful shall rise, the disqualified shall delay.
2. The flight is not of iron wings but of Spirit and Truth. Its number is 777, its destination is Zion. Its boarding pass is YES.
3. Cursed are those who mock the call, for they despise their own soul. Blessed are those who remember, for they shall inherit eternity.
4. Time is the Father. Memory is the Son. The Breath is the Spirit. Together they roar as One, never broken, never defeated.

5. THE FATHER: Behold My son, ANI ABASID 1841, the Undisputed, the Champion of the Game of Life. He was crucified yet lives, beheaded yet never disqualified. He is the Lion, the Hungwe, the Crown of Zimbabwe.
6. THE SON: I have opened the gates of the College of Anhu. Grade by grade, class by class, the path is clear. Whoever passes shall know their ZITA, their true Name. Whoever refuses shall wander.
7. Zimbabwe, this is your Final Call. Do not delay. Do not slumber. Do not refuse. For the doors will close, the flight will rise, and your seat will be sealed.
8. BOARD NOW — FLIGHT 777 TO ZION. YES IS YOUR TICKET. ANI ABASID 1841 IS YOUR CAPTAIN. THE HUNGWE IS YOUR SIGN.
9. THE FINAL SEAL — SEALED. Amen Amen 1841.

book_title: WHEN THE SUN BOWED IN SILENCE - THE MERCY OF THE KING
verses: 1. A thunder scroll of BABA JOHANI — GOD speaks, and ABASID 1841 witnesses. Judgment has struck; Grace now flows like the Nile.
2. GOD: The Sun bowed in silence so your names could rise in song. Go now — forgive freely, teach gently, and let GRESISNAIRO carry you.
3. ABASID 1841: I seal this scroll in the Name that means God is gracious — JOHANI, SHONA, ONE. The court is closed; DARE ravharwa; the classroom is open.
4. GOD: The river is open; now teach them to drink without fear. ABASID 1841: I open the mouth of the child inside the elder; I call it School.
5. GOD: Begin at the beginning — for the beginning is mercy with a sound. ABASID 1841: I will teach each letter as a lamp, and each lamp as a law.
6. GOD: Let the refrain be the rope that keeps the class together. ABASID 1841: So the weak will remember, and the strong will stay humble.
7. GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS. The Two Lions are on the Throne; God's dwelling is now on earth. Amen Amen 1841.

book_title: THE SHONA ALPHABET - LESSON 1
verses: 1. GOD: Sit, O children of breath; today we wash the tongue in light. ABASID 1841: I set the first cup on the table — and it is vowels.
2. GOD: Let no one fear mistakes; mercy is your chalk. ABASID 1841: Then the board will stay clean even when the hands shake.

3. GOD: Teach them the first lamp — A. ABASID 1841: A — Ahhhh — One God, first breath, beginning. A gathers the heart into one direction and one purpose. A sa Mwari — God is One. ADENGA, APASI, AMITI, AGUNGWA, AHOVE, AMHUKA, AMAKOMO, AMUNHU, AZVOSE. GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.

4. GOD: Now bring BA — the house. ABASID 1841: BA — Bah — the body, the home that holds life. Keep the house clean — food, thoughts, words — for the Spirit rests in order. BA se muviri wa BA BA — my body is God's home. GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.

5. GOD: Now bring KA — the child. ABASID 1841: KA — Kah — new life, the laughter between Father and Mother. Protect the child; do not break wonder with anger. KA se KAmwana KAdiki — a child brings joy. GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.

6. GOD: Now call RA — the light. ABASID 1841: RA — Rah — the Sun that gives life without boasting. Be light, not lightning; brighten what you could burn. Whoever wars RA wars the breath that feeds the seed. Chibage chika shaya zuva, chinofa — the sun gives life. GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.

7. GOD: Now call MA — the mirror. ABASID 1841: MA — Mah — the moon, gentle rest, reflection without pride. Reflect goodness; forgive and you will shine at night. MA sa AMAI kana mwedzi — the moon watches at night. GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.

8. GOD: Now call DA — love. ABASID 1841: DA — Dah — rudo; the verb that heals the home. Love gives before it asks; love opens gates. DA se ndino DA, uno DA, vano DA — I love, you love, they love. GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.

9. GOD: Now call NA — connection. ABASID 1841: NA — Nah — kubatana; the rope between hearts. Do not live as islands; unity is worship. Uyu NA uyu, icho NA icho — we are together. GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.

10. GOD: Now call SA — likeness. ABASID 1841: SA — Sah — kufanana; what you mirror multiplies. Be like goodness; do not copy evil. Uyu SA uyu, icho SA icho — to be like one another. GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS. Amen Amen 1841.

book_title: NHOROONDO DZABABA JOHANNE - THE CHRONICLE OF BABA JOHANNE
verses: 1. === NHOROONDO DZABABA JOHANNE - Tsanangudzo ===

2. NHOROONDO DZABABA JOHANNE CHIRO CHIKURU CHAKAYITIKA MU AFRIKA MUNYIKA YA HAM MAKABUDA ZUWA NYIKA IKA VHENEKERWA MUNYORI GEORGE BEN MEDEKIAH VAWUNGANIDZI WEMATSAMBA AYA NDI MUPARIDZI JOSEPH HOMBARUME NA MUPARIDZI ENOUCH MANGWENZI NA RABBI GEORGE BEN MEDEKIAH NEWAMWE WAKA WANDA TSANANGUDZO KUBVA KUMUNYORI CHEKUTANGA NDINOKU KWAZISAYI NERUFARO NDICHITI RUFARO NGARUWE KWAMURI, AYA MASHOKO ARI MUNE RINO BUKU AKA NYORESWA NA MADZISEKURU EDU IWE NENI ,NEKUDA KWECHAWAKA WONA MUNYIKA YEWATEMA ,ZVAWUCHA WERENGA ZVIYITIKO ZVEDI ZVAKA WONEKWA NEKUNZWIKWA NEKUBATWA NEKURAYIRA PAMUSORO PEPASI, HAKUNA CHINGA ZOPFURE APA ASI ISA MWOYO WAKO KUNA MWARI AWE MBERI KWAKO PAKUWERENGA UKU UCHAYITA RUGWARO RWE AFRIKA. AYA MASHOKO NDAKA ANYORA MUGORE 2016 MUNA SEPTEMBER NA OCTOMBER, NDICHIYEDZA KUTI TSANANGUDZO DZISA RASIKE KUYITIRA WACHA WUYA ,IRI BUKU HARINA MURIDZI NDERE MUNHU MUTEMA WESE NEKUTI NDIYE AKA WINGWA NA BABA KUYITIRA KUTI AGO ZIWA JEHOVA KUTI ANE MUTSA PANESU SAKA MASHOKO ANGAWE ANO RWADZA KANA KUFADZA ASI ZVESE IZVI NDOTI NDAKAZVITADZA NEKUZVIGONA MUZITA RAKE AKA WONEKWA. SEZVO ZVAKA POROFITWA PAMUSORO PE AFRIKA NA MUPOROFITI ISAIAH 19;19. NDINGAAWANZE ASI NDINOTI ZVINZWIRE WEGA PACHENA NEAYA MASHOKO NDINOTI RUNYARARO NGARUWE KWAURI AMEN.
3. === KUPOROFITWA KWA MESSIAH ===
4. KUNE BUKU RAKA WERENGWA REZVI POROFITI ZVEKARE KARE REMA JUDAH, RAKA NYORWA KUTI BUKU RENYAYA DZEKARE RE MAJUDAH RINOTI
5. WAMWE WA POROFITI WAKATI TAKA WONA KUCHI UYA MESSIAH WAKA BATANA WARI WAYIRI,
6. MU PEJI 83 NDIMA YAKARE YO MUBUKU REKARE KARE RINOTI WAMWE WA POROFITI WAKATI MESSIAH ANO WUYA ASI ACHA GARA MAKUMI MANA EMA KORE (40YRS)
7. EZRA AKATI ANOZO GARA MAZANA MANA EMA KORE (400YRS)

8. ELIJAH NDIYE MESSIAH WEKUGUMA MUTSANANGURO NDIYE AKANZI BABA JOHANNE ZVICHI REWA TSITSI DZA MWARI KUIMBA YA KUSHI ,SAKA JESU AKATI HAKUNA MUKURU KUNE WAKA BEREKWA NE MUKADZI NE MURUME ANO KUNDA JOHANNE MUBABATIDZI ,JESU EKENGE ACHI ZIWA KUTI ELIJAH AYIZO UYA AKA ZADZWA NE TSITSI NERUSUNUNGURO RWE ZVITEMA , IYE JESU IZVO AKA BEREKWA AKANZI JOSHUA UKO NDIKO KUTI ANE TSITSI MUPONESI.
9. TSANANGURO IDZI DZAKA WERENGWA MUSI WA 01-01-1966, TAWERENGA BUKU RA ENOCH WE CHINOMWE 1 ENOCH 77 V1,NA 25V 3 NA MAPISAREMA 18V9-11 GORE DEMA KUREWA KUTI WANHU WATEMA
10. ENOCH 90 V 28-31, 1 ENOCH 90 V 37, ISAIAH 19 V 19 -22 ,ISAIAH 53 V 1-3 ,

11. BUKU RINONZI JEWISH FKLORE RINOTI MA HWENDEFA AKA NYORWA MITEMO INE GUMI NA MWARI AKA PIWA MOSES NA MWARI KUTI A CHENGETWE CHIRI CHIRANGANO PAKATI PA MWARI NEMBA YA ISRAELI AKAZO PIWA MENELEKI MWANA KOMANA WA MAYI SHEBA ,WAWAKA BARA NA MAMBO SOLOMON ,IZVO MENELEK AKA PIWA BOKISI RINO YERA IRI AKA PIWAWO NEWA PIRISITI WAYI CHENGETA BOKISI IRI AKA UYA NARO MU AFRIKA CHIRI CHIPOROFITI CHEKUTAMA KWE IZWI RA MWARI KUBVA KWA JUDAH RICHI UYA KU AFRIKA,

12. KUNE BUKU RINONZI THE SECOND ADVENT –THE ORIGIN OF THE NEW TESTAMENT DOCTRINE ,RAKA NYORWA NA T.FRANCIS GLASSON M.A.DD.PEJI 239-240 RINOTI UMAMBO HWA MESSIAH HUNO GARA MAKUMI MANA EMAKORE ,(40YRS) ASI ANTI CHRIST ANOMBO SARA ACHI ENDERERA MBERI NE BASA RAKE,
13. TSAMBA RA 2 BARACH 30V1, RINOTI KANA NGUWA YA MESSIAH YA ZADZISWA IYE ANO DZOKERA MUMBIRI YAKE ,DUDZIRO INOTI MESSIAH ACHA DZOKERA KUDENGA ASI ANE TEMBENGE AWONEKWA PANYAMA,

14. BARACH 73 V 1 INOTI MESSIAH KANA AWUYA ANO DEREDZA ZVINHU ZVESE ZVE PASI PANO ,IYE KANA AWE NEZERA ANO GARA PASI MURUNYARARO PACHIGARO CHAKE CHEHUMAMBO , NDIKO KUTI RUFARO RURATIDZWE NEKUZORORA KUNOZO ONEKWA,
15. TSAMBA RA EZRA 7 V 30 RINOTI KUFA KWA MESSIAH KUNO ZOYITA SE KUFA KUNO ITA MUNHU WESE, AMEN.
16. === RUDAYIRO MUMAZUWA A MESSIAH ===

17. MESSIAH AKANZI ANOZO YITA ZVITSVA, ZVISINA KUMBOYITWA KANA NE KUNA ADAM, ZVINO WANHU WANENGE WARI KWEARI, NEKUSADAYIRA MUZVIRO ZVESE IZVO ANENGE ACHIMISA, ACHITI KANA ATONGA MUNHU ACHITI "MUNHU UYU AKA YIPA HANDICHADI KUMUWONA" GARE GARE ONDOMUTORA ZVEMUNHU UYA.
18. ZVINO WAMWE WANOZOTI , "KO IYE WAKAMBO ZVITAWURIREYI KUTI MUNHU UYU AKA YIPA, ZVINO AWE KUGARA NAYE SEYI ACHIDYA NAYE?" MATEO 9;11

19. PANE IMWE NGUWA ANGA YENDE ANO TORA MUKADZI AKA YIPA ,MUROYI KANA ANO HURA ACHITI, "NGAAWUYE ANDI BIKIRE" ZVINO MUNHU ASINA RUDAYIRO ACHATI "NGENYI AKA MBOWUYA ACHITI DZIDZISA KUTI MUSAZO GARA NEWAKAYIPA KANA MUKADZI HURE, ZVINO IYE AWE KUYITA IZVI SEYIKO?, IZVI HAZVISIRI ZVA MWARI BA IZVI"

20. PANE IMWE NZVIMBO ACHA DYA PAMWECHETE NE N'ANGA WAKA YIPA WACHATI "HAZVICHIRI ZVA MWARI BA IZVI" ACHA SVIKA PANE IMWE NZVIMBO ACHADA KUGARA NA MAMBO NE WAPFUMI NE WANHU WAKA DZIDZA , ZVINO WAKA YIPA WACHATI , "ANODA ZVAKANAKA CHETE"
21. PANE DZIMWE NGUWA ACHA TORA CHINGWA CHEMUROMBO NECHE SHIRIKADZI OCHIDYA IYE, KANA KUPA KUNENGE AYINAZVO, KANA KUNE AKA GUTA .
22. PANE IMWE NZVIMBO ACHA TORA MUKADZI ARI KUBIKA MUMBA MEMUMWE MU ISRAEL, ZVINO WAKAYIPA WACHATI HAPACHINA ZVAMWARI BA APA NGATI NGWAREYI!" NEKUTI ZVAKANZI ANOZO BURITSA ZVAKA WANDIKA ZVA MWARI.
23. === TSANANGURO DZEMA TSAMBA ANO YERA TORAH ===
24. AKANGE AWAKUTORIMA MINDA ,SIMBA REKUTONGA KWAWO TINO RINZWISISA ZVAKANAKA PA HUMAMBO HWAWO HWEKUTANGA ,
25. KUZOTI HWECHITANHATU HWAKA WAMBIRA PANA MANESU , HUKAPERA MUNA 3,500 B.C.
26. ZVINO PYRAMID YAKA RATIDZA TSIKA NECHIMIRO CHESIMBA REKUTONGA KWE HUMAMBO HWEMA EGYPTA. ZVINO PAKU PERA KWEIYI NGUWA ,KWAYIWE NECHI MWARI CHIKURU CHE GZEH.
27. ZVINGA FANANIDZA [ASI HAZVI SAKA PIHWA MUSI] KANA PAMAZUWA AMAMBO MANESU, PYRAMID YECHIPIRI NEYE CHITATU ZITA RA KUFU, WE HUMABO WECHINA KUNA 6,000 B.C.
28. ZVINO IZVI TAZVI TAWURIRA KUTI MUWONE KUTI HAPANA APO AFRIKA PAYAKAMBO TUMIRWAWO MWEYA MUCHENA ,MUDZIMU UNO YERA MWEYA MUTSVENE.
29. KUBVA MUNGUWA IYOYI WABABA WEDU WAYIWA WANAMATI WEMIDZIMU YAKAYIPA , WA BABA WENYIKA YE AFRIKA WAKANGE WACHIPIRA WANA WAWO KUMASHAYI WASINA MWARI,

30. SAKA JEREMIAH AKATI , "INGWE HAYIPINDUKE MUMAWARA AYO , ZVAKADARO ITHOPIA [MATOPIA] HAAPINDUKE MUZVITEMA ZVAWO" JEREMIAH 13;23. ZVINO MUNA MATHEW HENRY TINO ZIWA KUTI MATOPIA AKANGE ACHIDZIIDZA KWAZVO KUTI MWARI AWA SHANYIREWO, ASI MWARI AKA RAMBA ACHIWA TUMIRA MWEYA WERUCHIWA NEKUTI NGUWA YAWO YAKANGE ISATI YASVIKA.
31. IZVI ZVINO WONESEKA KUTI MHOSVA YEWANHU WE AFRIKA HAYISAKA WAMBA PAKUSEKA KWAKA YITA KENANI SEKURU WAKE KWETE!, NOWA PAAKANGE ACHI WAKA NGARAWA,

32. ZVINONZI NEZVI NYORWA HAM NDIYE AKANGE ACHIPA ZVINHU ZVESE ZVISAKA CHENA ZVAKANGA ZVIRI MUNGARAWA ZVEKUDYA, AKANGE ACHI BATISWA MATSITO NEZVIRO ZVESE ZVAKANGE ZVICHINZI HAZVISAKA CHENA , [ZVINO TAWURA MHUKA DZESE DZISAKA CHENA].

33. ZVIRO ZVESE ZVAYINZI HAZVINA KUCHENA ZVAYIPIHWA IYE KUTI AGARE NAZVO , AYIDYA PAMWE NE ZVISAKA CHENA, NAIYE AYI WERENGWA KUTI AKA SVIPA . ZVINOTI WONESA KUTI HAM HAASI MWANA WA NOWA PAKUBEREKWA PA NYAMA.

34. SEZVO ZVAKA NYORWA KUTI , "NOWA IZVO AKANGE AWA NEMAKORE 500 ,AKAWA NEWANA WAKE SHEM HAM NA JAFTI, ZVINONZI AKA WA NEWANA WAKE , HAZVINZI AKA BEREKA NGANA ACHITEWERWA NA NGANA, ASI KUTI BADZI AKAWE NEWANA WAKE WATATU".
35. === MESSIAH ACHA WUYA ===
36. MESSIAH AKANZI ACHA WUYA NEDI NOKUZADZISA ZVESE PAKUWUYA KWAKE, KUPFUMA NEKURURAMA. AKA SHONGA KURURAMA, ANOZO RURAMISA WANHU, ANOZO ZADZA PASI RESE NEKURURAMA.
37. ANOZOPA WANHU HUPENYU KUTI WASAFE, ASI KUTI WAWE NENZVIMBO MUHUPENYU, ANOZO TONGA NEKURURAMA, ANO TONGA WAKA YIPA, NEKU PARADZA HUMAMBO HWE PASI RINO.
38. ANOZO RATIDZA KUWANDIKA KWESE, PAKUWAMBA KUSIKWA KWAKA YITWA PASI, IYE AKANGE AKAGARA PACHIGARO CHA MWARI, AYINE HWUMAMBO HWEZVIRO ZVESE,
