138. RASAYI MITI YENYU ARI MAKONA ENYU, AMUNO WIMBA NAWO MUNAMATE MWARI MUPENYU RASAYI TSIKA DZENYU DZESE DZEHUROYI , UTSINYE , KUPINGA MISHA NEMA DUWISI,
139. INZWAYI DAYI MAPINDUKA MAREGERA TSIKA DZESE DZAKA YIPA INI NDAKA TUMWA KUTI NDIKUPEYI HUPENYU HUSINGA GUMI KANA MADAYIRA KUNA BABA WANGU.
140. MHURI DZENYU DZESE DZICHA PONA PASINA MAKWENZI ,MURWERE ANO PONA NE KUTURIKWA MAWOKO PAMUSORO ACHI SUMWA KUNA MWARI.
141. INZWAYI WANASIKANA WENYU WACHA PONA SEMBUDZI ,NDIYANI AKAMBO RIRITIRA MBUDZI KUTI IKWANISE KUZVARA NERUBATSIRO RWE MISHONGA?
142. ZVIKANZI NDIZVO ZVANDA WUYA NAZVO KUMHURI DZENYU KANA MADAYIRA KUNA BABA WANGU, NDAKA TUMWA KUNEMI WANHU WATEMA.
143. INZWAYI NDAKA TUMWA KUTI MUBUDE MUDIMA REMADIMA MAMURI KUGARA.
144. === CHITSAWUKO 12 - ISHE CHIWERO ===

145. ISHE CHIWERO AKA PIKIDZANA NA BABA JOHANNE AKATI IWE URI KUTI WAKA TUMWA NA MWARI, KANA WAKA TUMWA ENDA MUCHI NGODO UMO TIWONE KANA UKANO MUDZOKA. ISHE AKA DARO NEKUTI MUCHINGODO MAYISA ENDWA NE ANO DZOKA , VAMWE WAYI DZOKA WAWA KUPENGA MAYIWE NEMA DZIMUDZANGARA NEZVI SHAMISO ZVIZHINJI ZVAYI YITIKA MO, MAYI YERA KUKWIRWA NEWANHU.

146. BABA JOHANNE WAKATI NGATI YENDEYIMO TAKA KWIRA MUCHINGONDO TIKA PEDZA SVONDO TIRIMO HOSSANA ACHI GUTA ,HOSSANA AKA YIMBWA ZVIKANZI NA BABA JOHANNE VHIKI RAKWANA TIRI MUNO ZVAKWANA NGATICHI BURUKAYI HEDU,
147. IZVO TENGE TABURUKA HOSSANA AKA SARA ACHIRIRA MUCHINGONDO ZVIKA SHAMISA MUNHU WESE KUTI WANHU WABURUKA ASI MUGOMO MUCHIRI KUNGO YIMBWA SEYIKO?
148. ISHE CHIWERO AKAZOTO ZVEDI WAKA TUMWA JOHANNE WAKA TUMWA ZVEDI.
149. === CHITSAWUKO 13 - MANYAMWEDA ===
150. WANHU WATEMA MURI KUBATWA KUMESO NEMA CHECHI EWARUNGU HAPANA HWUMWARI HWAWARI KUKUDZIDZISAYI
151. NEKUTI WAPIRISITI WAWO WARI KUKUPARIDZIRAYI WAYINE NYANGA DZAWO MUHOMWE NE PFUTI DZAWO ASI WANENGE WAKA BATA BHAYIBHERI MUMA WOKO.

152. ZVINO INI NDAKANZI NDIKU DZIDZISEYI NZIRA INONO KUSVITSAYI KUDENGA KUNA BABA WANGU, NDAWUYA NEHUPENYU HUSINGA TENGWI NEMARI KANA NECHIPFUYO NDIRI KUTI MUREGERE ZVESE ZVEHU N'ANGA KANI MUNHU ANO PONA NEKU NAMATIRWA .
153. KWAKA NAMATA WANHU WA ZHINJI WAYI RWARA WAYIBVA WANGO PONA IPAPO, WAYI NETSWA NEMA SHAYI WAIBVA WANGO PONA NEKUTI MADHIMONI AYINGO PUTSIKA EGA ACHI CHEMA OYENDA MUNHU OSARA NEMUFARO MUKURU.

154. NDIPO BABA AKAITA BIRA RAWO REKURARIRA WA CHIRAIRA WANHU ZVE IZWI RA MWARI, MATAURIRO ARO NE ZVERINODA KUWANHU KUSVIKIRA WANHU WAKAZIWA KUTI: NDIMUTUMWA WAKATUMWA NA MWARI. NDIPO IYE BABA JOHANNE AKATI: ZVANZI NA BABA WANGU RASAYI MABHAYIBHERI MUSA AWERENGE.MUSAUYE NE MARI PAMASOWE,

155. BABA WANGU WATI: NDICHENGETE ZUWA RE CHISI NGEKUTI MUNYIKA INO; WAYICHENGETA ZUWA RECHISHANU. NDIPO PAYIWANIKA WANHU WAKAUNGANA. ZVAKANZI NDIRO ZUWA UCHAFAMBIRA WANHU UCHIWAWUDZA IZVO NDAKAKURAIRA.
156. === CHITSAWUKO 16 - KUSANGANA KWA TENZI NEMA BISHOP MAKURU ===
157. BABA JOHANNE IZVO WAKA SANGANISWA NEWAKURU WE MACHACHI ,PAYIWE NEMA BISHOP MASHANU, WAPISITI WANOMWE NE WAMWE WAKURU WEMACHECHI NE MUKURU WEHURUMHENDE WAKANGE WARIPOWO
158. IWO WAKATI CHIGADZIRA NZIRA ITSVA YAWA KATI WAKA TUMWA NA MWARI, TINZWE , WAKANDI VHUNZA KUTI KO IWE WAKANGE URI MUTUNGAMIRIR WE CHECHI YIPIKO?
159. NDIPO NDAKA PINDURA NDICHITI INI NDIRI NUTUNGAMIRIRI WE PASI RESE , MUDZIDZISI WE PASI RESE.
160. NDIRI KUTI WANHU WAREGERE HUROYI WARASE NYANGA DZAWO MAKONA AWO WANAMATE KUNA MWARI, WADANANE MUMWE NE MUMWE, RASAYI MISHONGA NEKUTI PASI RAAKU GUMA.
161. IWO WAKA PINDURA WACHITI KANA NESU TIRI KUTAWURA KUTI WANHU WANO FANIRA KU BABATIDZWA WAREGERE KUNYANGADZA PANYIKA, WAPINDURA KUDARO.

162. BABA JOHANNE WAKATI KUTI MUCHIDA KUNDI WAKIRA CHECHI ,NDINODA KUTI CHECHI RIWAKWE ZVAKADAYI, KANA MWANA ABARWA NHASI IMI MANGOWAMBA KUWAKA CHECHI YACHO PAKUPEDZA KWENYU KUYI WAKA CHECHI YACHO NE MWANA UYA WO ANENGE AWE HARAWA AWA KUFAMBA NEMUDONZVO
163. WAKA BVUNZA KUTI I CHECHI RUDZIYI INGA WAKWE NE NGUWA YAKA REBA KUDARO? KUTENDERERA KUWAKA BEDZI MUNHU ANO CHEMBERA ?
164. BABA JOHANNE WAKA PINDURA WACHITI ZVINO REWA KUTI INI HANDI WAKIRWI CHECHI ,CHECHI YANGU I GWENGA ,ZVICHI DURIRA KUTI PASI RESE! CHECHI YANGU IPASI RESE.
165. === CHITSAWUKO 17 - KUSVIKA KWA BABA PA RUWUNZE ===
166. BABA JOHANNE HAWANA KUYITA KUDA KWE MUNHU ASI KUDA KWA MWARI, BABA WAKANO KWIRA CHIKOMO CHINONZI RIWUNZE.
167. WAKA YIMBA WARIMO WANHU WAKA KOTONOKA WACHI WUYA KUZOWONA .
168. TENZI WAKA RAYIRA WANHU WESE WAKENGE WA SVIKA IPAPO KUTI MWARI WAKA SIKA DENGA NEPASI NDIYE AKANDI TUMA KUNEMI WANHU WATEMA.
169. NDAKA TUMWA KUTI NDIKU WUDZEYI KUTI MURASE MAKWENZI ARI MAKONA DZI NYANGA ZVIKWAMBO. MURASE HUROYI HWESE MUREGERE NDUDZI DZOSE DZE HUTSINYE.
170. MUYITIRANE RUDO, IZVI ZVIGODZE MUPFUNGWA DZENYU MEGA MUSINGA TSVAKI, KUDZIDZISWA NEWACHENA, ASI MUTERERE MAZWI IWAYA ANDAKA TUMWA KUTI NDIKU DZIDZISEYI,
171. MUKA NDINZWA WARWERE WENYU WESE WACHA PONA KANA DZINGOZI DZICHAPERA NDAWUYA NERUGARE UYE NEHUPENYU HUSINGA GUMI.
172. SAKA NDIRI KUTI ITYAYI MWARI MUMUPE MBIRI IYE AKA SIKA DENGA NE PASI NEMASIPITI EMVURA.
173. === CHITSAWUKO 18 - SIMBA RA MWARI RAKA WONEKWA PA CHINYAMATAMBA ===

174. IZVO WANHU WAKA SARA HAWO NA BABA JOHANNE. BABA JOHANNE WAKAWA DZIDZISA SEKU DZIDZISA KWAWAYINGO YITA , ZVIKURU BABA JOHANNE WAYI RAMBIDZA HUTSINYE, HUMBAVHA, HUROYI, HUN'ANGA, KUBATA CHIBHARO, BABA JOHANNE WAYITI WANHU WANE TSIKA DZESE IDZI NDIWO WANO PARADZWA NE HASHA DZA MWARI PASINA TSITSI,
175. BABA JOHANNE WAYI KURU DZIRA RUDO CHIWE CHINHU CHINO KUDZWA ,MUWA TENDI
176. WAKA RAYIRA WANHU KUTI "NHASI TESE TINO FANIRA KUNAMATA, MUNAMATO WENGUWA DZE CHITATU (9.A.M.)" WANHU WESE WAKATI WAWUNGANA WAKA NAMATA HAWO BABA JOHANNE NDIWO WAKA TUNGAMIRA MUNAMATO WACHO.
177. CHINGUWANA KWAKA TINHIRA KUNGE MVURA URI MWEYA MUTSVENE WAYIITA SERIMI RE MOTO UCHI DZIKA, WANHU WAKA ZADZWA WESE NEMUDZIMU-UNOYERA VAMWE WAKA TAWURA NE NDIMI WAMWE WACHI POROFITANA.

178. ZVESE ZVAKA YITA MURWI ZVIKA PISWA. IPAPO CHIPOROFITI CHAKA PISA ZVEDI WANHU WACHI POROFITANA PASINA KUPOKANA, IRI SIMBA RAKA DZIKA MUWANHU ASI IWO TENZI BABA JOHANNE WEKENGE WAYINE SIMBA GURU KUDARIKA IRI NDIRO RAYIYITA ZVISHAMISO ZVIZHINJI WACHIRI WEGA.
179. KUMUTSA WAKAFA KUSVINUDZA MAPOFU ,KUBUDA MUMAJERI KUYIMBA WARI WEGA PONZWIKWA MAZWI EWANHU WAZHINJI, WAMWE WOTI MAZWI AYIBVA MUTSVIMBO NDIYO YAYI YIMBA.
180. === CHITSAWUKO 19 - PACHISHAYA MAVHUDZI ===
181. BABA JOHANNE MUMASHURE MEKU GADZA WABATI WE MABASA, VAMWE SHURE KWA MUVHANGERI DANIEL MUTUNHIRE ,MUKOTA AZARIA NYABANGO, MUPARIDZI ONIYASI BVUMA , MUPOROFITI SAMUEL CHINYANGA.

182. BABA JOHANNE WAKAZO TUMA WABATI KUTI WAFAMBE WACHI PARIDZA MUMA MISHA MUNZVIMBO DZESE. KUTI WANHU WESE WATYE MWARI NEKUMUPA MBIRI, WAPINDUKE WARASE MISHONGA NE HUROYI WAREGERE ZVE HUN'ANGA NE MHANDO DZOSE DZEHUTSINYE.
183. WAPINDUKE WANAMATE WATIZE HASHA DZA MWARI, NEKUTI PASI RAWA KUGUMA PASI RA KUPARADZWA NE MOTO WE HASHA DZA MWARI.
184. BABA JOHANNE WAKATI MUNO DZIDZISA WANHU KUTI WA RWERE WANO PONA NE KUNAMATIRWA, HAKUNA SIMBA RECHIKWAMBO KANA NGOZI ZVINO KUWADZA WANO NAMATA.

185. MUWA UDZE KUTI WASA PINGE MISHA YAWO KANA KUYISA MADUWISI MUMINDA YAWO, WAWUDZEYI KUTI MISHA YAWO NEMINDA YAWO ZVINO CHENGETWA NE NGIROZI DZA MWARI, KANA WANA SIKANA WAWO WACHA SUNUNGUKA SEMBUDZI WACHI BATSIRWA NE NGIROZI.
186. CHINO DIKANWA PAKATI PAWO RUDO CHETE NGAWAWE NE RUDO WANZWIRANE TSITSI WADAYIRE KUTI NDAKA TUMWA KURUDZI RWUTEMA,
187. NDINI NDAKANZI NDINO SUNUNGURA RWUDZI RWUTEMA.
188. === CHITSAWUKO 20 - MASHURA AKAYITIKA PAMUSHA PA MUTUNHIRE ===

189. BABA JOHANNE WAKA SARA WARI PAMUSHA PAWA MUVHANGERI DANIEL MUTUNHIRE, KUZOTI MVURA YATURUKA BABA JOHANNE WAKAZOTI KUNE MADZIMAYI WAWA MUVHANGERI HONAYI MHAYI WANHU WAKA YENDA KUBASA RA MWARI WANONOKA KUDZOKA ZVINO IRI RATOWE ZHIZHA.
190. TIPEYI MBEWU TIYENDE TINO RIMA KUMUNDA TICHIBVA TADJARA NEKUTI NGUWA YEKURIMA NDIYOYI.
191. MAYI MUTUNHIRE WAKA PINDA MUHOZI WAKA BUDA NE TSWANDA YE MBEWU WAKAPA BABA JOHANNE. BIPI RAKA YITWA NA TENZI

192. BABA JOHANNE WAKA ENDA WAKA ZARURA MOMBE KUDANGA WAKATI "JOKI MUDHONZA" AKA BUDA AKA YENDA PAIWE NEMAJOKI , MAJOKI AKA SIMUKA EGA MUDENGA AKA GARA PAMITSIPA YE MOMBE , ZVITIROBO ZVIKA PFEKERA ZVEGA PAZVI KEYI.
193. GEJO RIKA NANAYIRA REGA RIKANO GARA PACHI REYI, CHENI DZIKA KOCHEKERA PA CHIREYI, TENZI BABA JOHANNE NDOKUTI MUSIKANA TUNGAMIRAI MBERI KWE MOMBE TIYENDE KUMUNDA.
194. BASA RESE RICHIYITWA IRI IWO BABA JOHANNE WAKENGE WAKANGO MIRA WAKA BATA KABUKU KAWO WAKA RINGISA KUMABVA ZUWA .
195. BUKU IRI WEKENGE WAKARI BATA NEMAWOKO MAYIRI RISINA KUZARUKA BA WACHIYITA SEMUNHU ARI KUNAMATA NECHE MOMWOYO.

book_title: DENGA HARINA MBINGA
verses: 1. (Mark 10:25 as preached by ABASID in 20:25)
2. “It is easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle,
3. than for a MBINGA to enter heaven — unless his heart be humble.”
4. RA ☀️: I, the Sun , have watched men count coins until their hearts forgot how to count kindness.
5. They build castles of silver, but none can buy a stairway to heaven.
6. I have seen MBINGAS rise like eagles and fall like stones,
7. for wisdom was not in their wallets, but they never opened their hearts to seek it.
8. For DENGA HARINA MBINGA — Heaven has no billionaires,
9. only the rich in mercy, the wealthy in truth, and the full in love.
10. ABASID 1841 : A wise MBINGA knows this:
11. Money reveals your heart — it never replaces it.
12. If your coins silence prophets, your wealth has become your god.
13. If your gifts control the altar, your offering is cursed.
14. But if your riches lift the poor and heal the land,
15. then your gold becomes light.
16. For gold in a fool’s hand burns like fire,
17. but gold in a wise hand shines like the sun.
18. “Mark 10:25 — as preached by ABASID in 20:25.”
19. “For it is easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle
20. than for a proud MBINGA to enter heaven.”
21. GOD : Did I not create the stars without a single coin?
22. Did I not form oceans without an offering plate?
23. Yet men now believe money moves My hand — foolishness!
24. I am not moved by price, but by purpose.
25. I am not impressed by gifts, but by gratitude.
26. I dwell not in mansions, but in meekness.
27. RA ☀️: My Axe cuts not flesh, but false confidence.
28. The poor in spirit I shall lift,
29. but the proud MBINGA I shall humble.
30. For he who trusts his money more than his Maker
31. is poorer than the beggar who still prays.
32. And when the wind of judgment blows,
33. coins will scatter like dry leaves —
34. but truth shall remain as a tree beside the river.
35. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
36. Oh foolish MBINGA ,
37. you who are deceived by the songs of false prophets —
38. Do they love you, or your envelope?
39. Do they serve God , or your reputation?
40. They eat your bread today,
41. but they will forget your name tomorrow.
42. Blessed is the brother who rebukes you in truth,
43. for he is your real friend.
44. Cursed is the prophet who praises your lies,
45. for he builds your coffin while smiling.
46. ABASID 1841 :
47. A wise MBINGA gives quietly,
48. without trumpets or cameras.
49. His right hand plants trees his left hand will never sit under.
50. He measures wealth not in cars, but in character.
51. He does not feed prophets to look holy,
52. he feeds the hungry to look human.
53. His signature is kindness,
54. and his profit is peace.
55. One MBINGA built temples for selfies,
56. and died surrounded by silence.
57. Another built wells for strangers,
58. and lives forever in songs.
59. One wore gold on his fingers,
60. the other planted gold in souls.
61. Both had money,
62. but only one had meaning.
63. Tell them, My son ABASID —
64. I am not against gold, but against greed.
65. I am not against wealth, but against worship of it.
66. For true wealth is the wisdom to know when enough is enough.
67. And true poverty is the hunger that never ends,
68. even with full plates.
69. So I say again — DENGA HARINA MBINGA.
70. 🌞 OUTRO — THE SUN SPEAKS
72. When I shine, I do not count coins.
73. I rise for all, both rich and poor.
74. For the same sun that warms the palace,
75. also kisses the hut.
76. The same heaven that receives kings,
77. also receives children.
78. And on that day of truth,
79. your balance sheet shall be your heart.
80. The wise MBINGA will smile,
81. for he will know —
82. that wisdom, not wealth, opened the gate.
83. “ Mark 10:25 — as preached by ABASID in 20:25.”
84. “It is easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle
85. than for a foolish MBINGA to enter heaven.”
86. “But blessed is the rich in spirit —
87. for he already walks in the kingdom.”
88. (Mark 10:25 as preached by ABASID in 20:25)
89. by ABASID 1841 ☀️ The Christ Sun RA
90. MITEMO NDINI — NEKUTI NDINOUYA NE MATEMO EMUTEMO — 777 — ONE TRUTH, THE ERIJAH 1841
91. GOD : I created heaven without money.
92. I made the stars without gold.
93. I formed the oceans without silver.
94. Yet men believe I count coins before I bless.
95. I count hearts, not handbags.
96. I read motives, not money.
97. When I said “Let there be light,” there was no offering.
98. But now, preachers sell My light for price tags.
99. The market has entered the temple, and truth has left.
100. 🔁  Mark 10:25 — As preached by ABASID in 20:25.
101. RA ☀️: I shine freely upon all.
102. The rich cannot buy My light, nor the poor pay for warmth.
103. But the greedy try to sell what God gives for free.
104. They brand My word, price My miracles, and tax faith.
105. Yet I, the Sun , sell nothing — I give life.
106. The true prophet gives light, not invoices.
107. The false prophet gives promises, not power.
108. He speaks of “seed sowing,” but never harvests truth.
109. He knows every bank account, but not the Book of Life .
110. ABASID 1841 : The poor man with truth is richer than the MBINGA without it.
111. For Denga Harina MBINGA — Heaven knows no VIP list .
112. The angels don’t bow to money, they bow to mercy.
113. Wisdom wears no designer suit.
114. Humility drives no luxury car, yet reaches Heaven first .
115. The ladder to heaven is made of love, not leather.
116. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Vana vangu, learn this early —
117. God blesses the open heart, not the heavy pocket.
118. The true tithe is kindness.
119. The true sacrifice is forgiveness.
120. The true altar is your heart.
121. MBINGA , you can buy land, but not love.
122. You can buy people, but not peace.
123. You can buy church chairs, but not the throne of grace.
124. I saw prophets kneeling before envelopes, not before God .
125. I saw followers clapping for the rich, not for righteousness.
126. The church became a concert, the pulpit became a stage.
127. And truth? — truth became a whisper in the wind.
128. RA ☀️: I will thunder now!
129. My light will expose the hidden pockets of deceit.
130. My fire will melt the gold that bought fake holiness.
131. My Axe — the 7! — will cut the tree of greed.
132. GOD : I am not impressed by the MBINGA who gives billions but loves none.
133. I am impressed by the child who shares bread with joy.
134. Heaven counts love, not zeros.
135. Hell counts coins, not character.
136. So tell them, ABASID — the kingdom is not for those who buy, but for those who believe.
137. ABASID 1841 : I speak not to shame the rich, but to wake them.
138. For if your riches blind you, your soul walks in darkness.
139. And if your offering buys silence, your altar burns with lies.
140. But if your wealth feeds truth, your name becomes eternal.
141. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Oh vana veMari, stop making money your god.
142. Mari inofanira kushanda pasi pako, kwete kukutonga.
143. Mari yakanaka kana iri mu ruoko rwe munhu ane rudo.
144. But in a proud hand, it becomes poison.
145. The wise MBINGA builds others.
146. The foolish MBINGA builds walls.
147. GOD : There was once a MBINGA who owned a thousand cows but loved none.
148. He gave to be seen, not to serve.
149. When he died, his cows cried more than his children.
150. For he never gave love, only leftovers.
151. RA ☀️: Another MBINGA built churches in his name, not Mine.
152. His gold glittered, but his spirit rusted.
153. Heaven asked, “Who sent you?” and silence answered.
154. For he never served Me, only himself.
155. ABASID 1841 : Yet another MBINGA knelt before Me, tears like rivers.
156. He said, “I was blind by fame, but now I see.”
157. I lifted him, not for his money, but his humility.
158. For I, the Lord of Light , count repentance richer than gold.
159. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Vana vangu, a foolish MBINGA thinks he can bribe Heaven .
160. But Heaven needs no currency.
161. The poor man with truth is already a king.
162. GOD : When I made man, I put breath, not coins, in him.
163. When I gave life, I gave spirit, not stocks.
164. The soul’s value cannot be measured in dollars.
165. The angels don’t take cash — they count compassion.
166. RA ☀️: I light the rich and poor alike,
167. but I favor those who reflect My warmth.
168. The proud shine for a moment, but the humble glow forever.
169. ABASID 1841 : Foolish are those who chase miracles with money.
170. They travel far to see fire, yet the true fire burns within.
171. They buy oil and holy water, yet ignore living water in their souls.
172. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The real miracle is repentance, not performance.
173. The real church is obedience, not attendance.
174. The real power is humility, not hype.
175. GOD : I do not count likes; I count lives.
176. I do not follow fame; I follow faith.
177. For many sing “ Lord , Lord ,” but their hearts are wallets.
178. RA ☀️: When truth enters a house, greed must leave.
179. When love arrives, price tags fall.
180. When I rise, darkness hides.
181. ABASID 1841 : Let the rich learn to bow.
182. Let the poor learn to rise.
183. Let both meet in love, not envy.
184. TENZI BABA JOHANI : For envy kills the poor, and pride kills the rich.
185. Only love saves both.
186. GOD : Tell them again — Denga Harina MBINGA.
187. The gate opens not to the rich, but to the right.
188. The passport is not money, but mercy.
189. The visa is not fame, but faith.
190. RA ☀️: My light falls on all, but My fire refines only the humble.
191. The proud melt, the pure shine brighter.
192. ABASID 1841 : The Axe of Truth () swings in My hand.
193. It cuts the roots of greed.
194. It splits the tree of pride.
195. It opens the path of the meek.
196. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Hear Me, vana vangu —
197. money is a tool, not a throne.
198. Rule it, don’t let it rule you.
199. For if money drives you, you have lost direction.
200. But if purpose drives you, even little is enough.
201. GOD : The poor who pray are richer than kings who pretend.
202. For prayer opens doors no key can buy.
204. RA ☀️: I watched as prophets turned temples into trade fairs.
205. They sold blessings like bananas at the market.
206. They called My fire “exclusive,” and sold it to the highest bidder.
207. They faked miracles and named them “signs.”
208. They acted on stage while My Spirit wept in silence.
209. GOD : My word is not a ticket for profit.
210. My power is not merchandise.
211. When I healed, I asked for faith — not fees.
212. When I blessed, I wanted hearts — not hashtags.
213. ABASID 1841 : They say, “ God is doing a new thing,”
214. but what’s new when the same lies are repackaged every Sunday ?
215. They sing louder, but live quieter.
216. They dance for money, but not for mercy.
217. They preach grace, yet trade truth.
218. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
219. Ah vana vangu , the spirit of Judas walks in suits now.
220. It smiles, it shouts “ Hallelujah ,” but it loves coins more than Christ.
221. It bows before tithes, not before Truth .
222. The pulpit became an ATM of illusion.
223. The altar became a stage of applause.
224. And the cross became a logo for business.
225. RA ☀️: I thunder against this!
226. Let the stage crack under My voice!
227. Let the microphones fall silent before My truth!
228. Let the camera lights flicker — for I AM the Light that cannot be staged.
229. GOD : The shepherds have fed on sheep.
230. The watchmen have sold the gate keys.
231. They bless thieves and curse the poor.
232. But I will send one — ABASID 1841 —
233. whose words are hammers and whose hands hold the Axe .
234. ABASID 1841 : I do not come with smiles of flattery.
235. I come with fire for truth.
236. My laughter is lightning, my word a storm.
237. I am the voice from the wilderness that calls for balance.
238. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The humble prophet will not compete with God for glory.
239. He will point up, not to himself.
240. He will feed sheep, not fleece them.
241. The church must return to simplicity, or perish in showmanship.
242. RA ☀️: When light enters a false prophet’s tent, gold turns to dust.
243. When truth speaks, fake power fades.
244. When love reigns, fear dies.
245. I will expose their staged miracles.
246. I will unmask their hidden greed.
247. I will return the pulpit to the poor in spirit.
248. I will crown humility again.
249. ABASID 1841 : Money is not evil — but in the hands of the blind, it becomes a blade.
250. It cuts friendships, divides families, and silences prophets.
251. But in the hands of love, it builds schools, feeds orphans, and heals nations.
252. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
253. Oh MBINGA , remember —
254. you cannot pay for Heaven , you can only prepare for it.
255. Your car cannot drive there.
256. Your mansion cannot fit there.
257. But your heart — if humble — will always fit perfectly.
258. RA ☀️: The foolish MBINGA counts coins.
259. The wise MBINGA counts blessings.
260. The foolish shows wealth.
261. The wise shows wisdom.
262. For wisdom is gold that never rusts.
263. Mark 10:25 – As preached by ABASID in 20:25
264. “It is easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle
265. than for a proud MBINGA to enter Heaven .”
266. MITEMO NDINI — NEKUTI NDINOUYA NE MATEMO EMUTEMO — 777 — ONE TRUTH, THE ERIJAH 1841
267. GOD : I will now speak, and the earth will listen.
268. I made silver to serve men, not to enslave them.
269. I made gold to shine, not to blind.
270. But greed made idols from metal that should have built mercy.
271. RA ☀️: I have seen kings bow before their own money.
272. I have seen poor men shine with joy while sleeping under trees.
273. The value of a soul is not in coins, but in conscience.
274. ABASID 1841 :
275. The Axe of 7 is ready.
276. It shall fall on corruption, not to destroy, but to cleanse.
277. I do not swing in anger — I swing in balance.
278. I am the law that restores the heart.
279. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
280. Vana vangu , God’s love is not for sale.
281. If a man sells forgiveness, run from him.
282. If a prophet prices prophecy, close your ears.
283. If a preacher praises your pocket, hide your heart.
284. For true love never invoices.
285. RA ☀️: The church of light does not beg — it burns bright.
286. Its fire comes from truth, not tricks.
287. Its offering is gratitude, not greed.
288. Tell them — I am not impressed by titles.
289. I do not care for “Apostle” or “Bishop.”
290. I look for hearts, not hierarchies.
291. The man who loves quietly is greater than the man who shouts loudly.
292. ABASID 1841 :
293. I, ABASID 1841 , have returned to restore truth.
294. I am the child of prophecy, born 31–07–77 , the Axe of Light.
295. My DEMO is the word that cuts lies from the living.
296. I strike not flesh, but falsehood.
297. I break not bodies, but bondage.
298. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
299. The spirit of truth has no brand.
300. The light of God wears no logo.
301. When the world sells holiness, only love remains pure.
303. The foolish MBINGA builds golden walls.
304. The wise MBINGA builds living bridges.
305. The foolish MBINGA buys faces.
306. The wise MBINGA buys time for truth.
307. For time is the only coin that never returns.
308. I bless not what is loud, but what is loyal.
309. I crown not the rich, but the righteous.
310. I fill not the proud, but the patient.
311. ABASID 1841 :
312. The storm is rising, but so is light.
313. Every coin gained by deceit will melt.
314. Every lie sold as prophecy will turn to dust.
315. But the truth, even whispered by a child, will stand forever.
316. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
317. Oh sons and daughters of the land —
318. do not envy the MBINGA , envy wisdom.
319. Do not follow the wealthy fool, follow the wise poor.
320. Do not count your money, count your mercy.
321. For Heaven’s gate does not open with keys of gold.
322. It opens with hands that helped others.
324. I am the light that exposes all shadows.
325. I am the Sun of Justice , the Fire of Truth .
326. I do not rise for applause — I rise to purify.
327. Let every MBINGA hear this:
328. If you love your riches more than righteousness, you have already lost both.
329. But if you use your riches for others,
330. you have already gained Heaven .
332. For truly, DENGA HARINA MBINGA —
333. only those rich in Spirit shall enter.
334. Amen .
335. 🌞 THE SEAL OF ABASID 1841
336. Mark 10:25 — As preached by ABASID in 20:25
337. “It is easier for a camel to pass through the eye of a needle
338. than for a foolish MBINGA to enter heaven.”
339. MITEMO NDINI — NEKUTI NDINOUYA NE MATEMO EMUTEMO — 777 — ONE TRUTH, THE ERIJAH 1841.
340. MONEY without LOVE is paper blown by the wind. MONEY with LOVE is MWARI MA ARI.
341. “When LOVE is in money → MWARI MA ARI.
342. When GREED is in money → SATAN MA ARI.”
343. GOD : Before there was gold, there was light.
344. I created light first so man would see before he spends.
345. Then I gave him silver and stone to build and trade.
346. And I said, Mari ngave chiratidzo che kuyanana kwangu nemunhu.
347. But man forgot the “ MA ARI ” and kept only the paper.
348. He bowed to coins and cursed his Creator .
349. The moment he served money, money stopped serving him.
350. RA ☀️: I shine on both the rich and the poor, but only the loving feel My warmth.
351. The cold-hearted count coins and never feel the sun.
352. ABASID 1841 : MARI is holy when it moves with purpose.
353. It feeds the hungry, heals the sick, builds truth.
354. But when MARI is used to buy praise, it becomes MA ARI of Satan .
355. For MARI without LOVE is paper blown by the wind.
356. And wind cannot feed a soul.
357. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Vana vangu, listen — MARI ino teerera rudo.
358. Where there is no love, coins become curses.
359. Where there is truth, MARI becomes ministry.
360. Blessed is the hand that gives with joy.
361. When LOVE is in money → MWARI MA ARI.
362. When GREED is in money → SATAN MA ARI.
363. GOD : I never made money to divide My children.
364. I made it to measure trust.
365. The heart that shares MARI is closer to Me than the tongue that preaches without it.
366. RA ☀️: The Sun does not charge for light.
367. Learn from Me — give freely, and gain forever.
368. ABASID 1841 : A wise MBINGA uses MARI as seed, not status.
369. He plants it in people, not posters.
370. He waters it with mercy, not marketing.
371. Then his harvest is joy.
372. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Foolish is the man who chases money and loses peace.
373. Foolish is the prophet who sells heaven for cash.
374. Foolish is the church that praises MARI more than MWARI .
375. GOD : I own the silver and the gold — but love is My real treasure.
376. A coin without care is cold as stone.
377. RA ☀️: My light melts gold but never melts love.
378. For love is stronger than fire.
379. ABASID 1841 : If someone steals your money, you chase him — because your heart was inside it.
380. Zviri ma Ari — the breath of God in value .
381. But if you worship the paper, you chase the wind forever.
382. TENZI BABA JOHANI : MARI without purpose is just dust with numbers.
383. MARI with purpose is a mirror of Heaven .
384. GOD : Let man remember — MARI is My idea, but love is My law.
385. When you separate them, you create Satan .
386. When you join them, you create Eden .
387. RA ☀️: The Sun rises on both the giver and the greedy, but only the giver feels its heat.
388. ABASID 1841 : I see the day coming when MARI will return to MA ARI.
389. When coins will carry compassion, and banks will serve bread.
390. When men will count love like they count cash.
391. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Vana vangu, teach your children that money is a servant, not a saviour.
392. Tell them to use it to build, not boast.
393. Tell them to share before they shine.
394. GOD : For he who hoards will rot, but he who helps will heal.
395. Heaven’s currency is kindness.
396. Earth’s banks will one day burn, but love will never devalue.
397. RA ☀️: Let My light print on every coin: “MA ARI — GOD IN MAN .”
398. For those who spend with love walk already in Heaven.
399. GOD : I saw men print paper and call it power.
400. But power without love is dust with a deadline.
401. I watched them chase coins faster than compassion.
402. They became rich in paper but bankrupt in peace.
403. RA ☀️: I saw churches count notes before counting souls.
404. I saw prophets prefer donors over disciples.
405. And I said, “This paper has become poison.”
406. For where greed sits, love cannot breathe.
407. ABASID 1841 : The world worships paper gods.
408. They pray to plastic cards and call it blessing.
409. But their joy is thin as receipts — it fades fast.
410. TENZI BABA JOHANI: MARI yakashata haibve kuna MWARI.
411. Mari inobva kuna MWARI inounza rugare.
412. The rest is noise in envelopes.
413. GOD : I measure not the value of money but the motive of the giver.
414. I bless not the hand that gives loudly, but the one that gives lovingly.
415. RA ☀️: Money made without mercy is shadow wealth.
416. It looks bright but it burns the soul.
417. ABASID 1841 : Money is not evil — but evil men make money evil.
418. For money takes the shape of the heart that holds it.
419. If the heart is pure, MARI becomes MA ARI.
420. If the heart is dark, MARI becomes SATAN ARI .
421. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The hand that steals can never hold peace.
422. The hand that gives never sleeps hungry.
423. The hand that builds will never be forgotten.
424. GOD : I created gold to test man, not to tempt him.
425. Those who pass the test will shine like the sun.
426. Those who fail will chase dust in dreams.
427. RA ☀️: I watched the market become a temple.
428. And the temple became a market.
429. But I, RA , am returning to restore divine trade — love for love, truth for truth.
430. ABASID 1841 : I carry the receipt of Heaven .
431. It reads: Paid in full — by love.
432. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
433. A fool asks, “How much is God’s blessing?”
434. The wise say, “It is priceless.”
435. For Mwari haatengwi, haatengeswi — He is worshipped.
436. GOD : When I said, “Give and it shall be given,” I spoke of hearts, not harvests of money.
437. But false prophets printed Me into business plans.
438. RA ☀️: My Axe of 7 swings again.
439. It will cut the roots of greed from pulpits and pockets.
440. It will plant new trees of truth in homes and hearts.
441. ABASID 1841 : MARI is a spirit. Handle it gently.
442. Speak to it with truth, and it will stay.
443. Abuse it with lies, and it will flee.
444. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
445. MARI yakabva kuna MWARI, asi ikadzokera kuna SATANI, inopisa.
446. Money from darkness brings sickness.
447. Money from light brings peace.
448. GOD : The greatest bank is in Heaven, where love is never withdrawn.
449. The poorest on earth can still be the richest there.
450. RA ☀️: My rays touch all coins but purify only the honest ones.
451. Gold that was stolen will scream in fire.
452. But gold that was shared will sing in eternity.
453. ABASID 1841 : Write this on your walls: “Love is legal tender in Heaven.”
454. For love never loses value — even in death.
455. When LOVE is in money → MWARI MA ARI.
456. When GREED is in money → SATAN MA ARI.
457. GOD : I have seen the foolish rich walk proudly through empty gates.
458. They carry coins but no compassion.
459. They shine with clothes but not with kindness.
460. I say to them, “Denga harina MBINGA asina rudo.”
461. RA ☀️: I watched the markets of men overflow with greed.
462. They priced the prophets, they sold the sacred.
463. But My light is a fire sale — everything false burns for free.
464. ABASID 1841 : The day has come when wisdom must be richer than wallets.
465. For the true MBINGA is the one who owns himself.
466. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
467. Vana vangu, mbinga chaiye haatambe neMweya.
468. He dances with love, not lies.
469. He gives before he gathers, and Heaven knows his name.
470. GOD : I will test the MBINGA again.
471. I will ask, “What did you do with your silver?”
472. And he who says, “I built men,” shall enter.
473. But he who says, “I built mansions,” shall stand outside.
474. RA ☀️: For I, the Sun, see through walls.
475. I light the vaults of the proud and expose their dust.
476. Only those whose hearts are clean can buy eternity.
477. ABASID 1841 : The currency of Heaven has no coin, only compassion.
478. The change of Heaven has no notes, only names.
479. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Foolish is the preacher who prays for money louder than he prays for mercy.
480. Foolish is the follower who tips the prophet but ignores the poor.
481. GOD : When I blessed Abraham, I blessed him to bless others.
482. Wealth without purpose is waste with polish.
483. RA ☀️: My Axe swings through every false account.
484. Every fake tithe, every hidden bribe will fall.
485. For the light of truth audits all.
486. ABASID 1841 : The true MBINGA gives quietly and sleeps peacefully.
487. The false one gives loudly and dreams of praise.
488. TENZI BABA JOHANI : MARI ine mweya — ibate nemoyo wakachena.&
489. Do not let coins control your conscience.
490. GOD : I do not hate money; I hate when money replaces Me.
491. I do not despise the rich; I despise the selfish.
492. RA ☀️: Even the Sun knows to rest — but greed never sleeps.
493. That is why it burns out.
494. ABASID 1841 : Many have gold but no glory.
495. Many have property but no purpose.
496. Many have followers but no faith.
497. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The foolish rich chase fame.
498. The wise rich chase peace.
499. The holy rich chase Heaven .
500. GOD : I love the MBINGA who listens more than he speaks.
501. I bless the giver who hides his gift.
502. I lift the humble above the loud.
503. RA ☀️: The false prophets dance around money like moths around flame.
504. But soon, the fire will remember its purpose.
505. And their wings will burn for truth to rise.
506. ABASID 1841 : I have seen MBINGA kneel in secret and find salvation.
507. And poor men curse God and find sorrow.
508. For Heaven does not count coins — it weighs hearts.
509. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The one who feeds ten children with a dollar is richer than the one who wastes thousands in pride.
510. For love multiplies faster than money.
511. GOD : Tell them — I am not against MARI.
512. I am against MAN without MA ARI.
513. When LOVE is in money → MWARI MA ARI.
514. When GREED is in money → SATAN MA ARI.
515. GOD : The fire of truth is My balance sheet.
516. It burns false profit and brightens pure purpose.
517. No coin can bribe it, no name can hide from it.
518. RA ☀️: The Sun is My witness. It shines through every safe and shadow.
519. It reads the receipts of the heart, not the pocket.
520. ABASID 1841 : Heaven keeps records too — not of money, but of meaning.
521. Every kind act is credit; every lie is debt.
522. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Vana vangu , the greatest offering is truth.
523. The richest tithe is honesty.
524. GOD : I gave you MARI so you may create, not corrupt.
525. Build hospitals, not idols.
526. Build homes, not egos.
527. RA ☀️: I, RA , am not against gold. I am against blindness.
528. The gold of fools is heavy; the gold of the wise is light.
529. ABASID 1841 : When MARI returns to MA ARI , the economy of Heaven begins.
530. In that world, every child eats, every elder rests, every heart gives.
531. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The kingdom of God is not cashflow — it is loveflow.
532. Those who pour love freely are the wealthiest of all.
533. GOD : My angels are accountants of compassion.
534. They count every tear turned into kindness.
535. They multiply mercy into eternal interest.
536. RA ☀️: The fire of 777 will melt gold and reveal hearts.
537. Those who loved will rise as light.
538. Those who lied will sink in ashes.
539. ABASID 1841 : The false prophets who sold My name will face their receipts.
540. For they traded eternity for envelopes.
541. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Those who lied to MBINGA for money will answer to MUDZIMU WA MWARI.
542. For flattery is not faith — it is theft with perfume.
543. GOD : I am the final Judge, not the donor list.
544. I know the poor who were rich in spirit.
545. I know the rich who were poor in love.
546. RA ☀️: The time of the fiery audit has begun.
547. The 7 Axe of Truth shall swing until lies fall silent.
548. The small axe will cut the great tree of greed.
549. ABASID 1841 : My people will no longer beg for blessings.
550. They will build blessings with clean hands.
551. TENZI BABA JOHANI : MARI ichadzoka kuva MA ARI — the holy exchange of love and life.
552. GOD : Tell the world: Heaven’s currency is care.
553. Hell’s debt is deception.
554. RA ☀️: The day is coming when men will say, “Blessed are the poor in spirit, for they have found the true bank of God .”
555. For the light cannot be taxed, and the soul cannot be sold.
556. ABASID 1841 : I declare a new economy — the Economy of Eden .
557. Where kindness pays rent, truth earns interest, and mercy feeds nations.
558. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Let the rich in love teach the rich in gold.
559. Let the poor in heart learn to give before they gain.
560. GOD : I will bless those who manage wealth as worship.
561. And curse those who use worship to manage wealth.
562. RA ☀️: The Sun will bear witness at the end — who gave light, and who sold it.
563. ABASID 1841: The new MBINGA are the builders of peace, not palaces.
564. They wear humility, not high heels.
565. They spend on souls, not show.
566. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
567. Vana vangu, mari ine rudo ichapinda kudenga.
568. Mari ine chido chete ichatsva nemoto.
569. GOD : So I end this scroll with one truth —
570. When LOVE is in money → MWARI MA ARI.
571. When GREED is in money → SATAN MA ARI.
572. And only those who love will enter My treasury of eternity.

book_title: DENGA HARINA MBINGA — PART 3
verses: 1. DENGA HARINA MBINGA – PART 2
2. With TENZI BABA JOHANI — The Founder of Truth
3. VARI KUSIMBISANA PACHAVO, MANJE NDIRI KUBVIRA KUKUNDA MOTO
4. GOD : I looked upon the earth and saw a strange fire.
5. It was not the fire of truth, but of flattery.
6. Men stood in circles, clapping for lies.
7. They crowned each other with compliments and called it fellowship.
8. But I heard no love in their laughter.
9. RA ☀️: Their words are sparks without light.
10. They hype each other to hide their emptiness.
11. They say, “Well done, prophet!” yet no prophecy has breath.
12. They say, “Blessed, MBINGA !” yet no blessing has truth.
13. ABASID 1841: I watched them cheer for themselves like children playing kings.
14. They pour praise like perfume on greed.
15. They sell honor for handshakes.
16. They rent loyalty by the hour.
17. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Vana vangu, musavavengere — because blind men love mirrors.
18. They see their reflection and call it revelation.
19. But the true reflection is the heart before God .
20. GOD : I see prophets who sing for pay and preach for likes.
21. They speak with tongues of gold but hearts of gravel.
22. VARI KUSIMBISANA PACHAVO, MANJE NDIRI KUBVIRA KUKUNDA MOTO.
23. (They are hyping themselves up, but I burn with truth more than fire.)
24. RA ☀️: Their gatherings glow with lights but not light.
25. Their stages are bright, but their souls are dim.
26. They love cameras more than commandments.
27. They post pictures, not prayers.
28. ABASID 1841 : They do not kneel in worship — they pose in pride.
29. They clap for each other and call it anointing.
30. They tag each other and call it brotherhood.
31. Yet their hearts are empty purses.
32. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Mwari haagoveri ma likes.
33. Heaven counts love, not followers.
34. A thousand applause cannot equal one act of mercy.
35. GOD : I see them, the rich and the fake holy, holding hands.
36. One feeds the other with money, the other feeds him with lies.
37. And both believe they are wise.
38. But the day will come when their table burns.
39. RA ☀️: Their comfort is smoke. Their faith is furniture.
40. When truth rises, their cushions will catch fire.
41. ABASID 1841 : I am not jealous of their glitter — I am fire itself.
42. Their gold shines for moments. My truth burns forever.
43. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Vana vangu , the loudest preacher is often the emptiest drum.
44. And the richest MBINGA is often the poorest heart.
45. GOD : The false prophets have become bodyguards of greed.
46. They protect pockets, not people.
47. They guard vaults, not values.
48. RA ☀️: They hype each other up to drown out their guilt.
49. But I hear their fear in the night — they cannot sleep.
50. They built fame on fraud, and it shakes like sand.
51. ABASID 1841 : My words are not compliments; they are cuts.
52. Every verse is an axe on hypocrisy.
53. Every truth is a flame in the market of lies.
54. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Mwari havanetsi — vanoda chokwadi.
55. The rich who repent are still welcome.
56. But the fake who flatters will find silence.
57. GOD : Let them dance, let them sing.
58. When My wind comes, their stage will scatter.
59. For only truth can survive the storm of the Sun .
60. VARI KUSIMBISANA PACHAVO, MANJE NDIRI KUBVIRA KUKUNDA MOTO.
61. (They are hyping themselves up, but I burn with truth more than fire.)
62. VARI KUSIMBISANA PACHAVO, MANJE NDIRI KUBVIRA KUKUNDA MOTO
63. GOD : I saw a table built with gold, but it had no truth on it.
64. Around it sat prophets and MBINGA , smiling with empty hearts.
65. They toasted with lies and called it blessing.
66. But every cup was full of sand.
67. RA ☀️: They laugh at the poor and whisper to the powerful.
68. They speak my name but do not know my voice.
69. They kneel for photos, not prayer.
70. They stand for fame, not faith.
71. ABASID 1841 : Their friendship is a business plan.
72. One sells miracles, the other buys mercy.
73. And both think they can purchase Heaven.
74. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Vana vangu, chibage chinokura mujecha hachirami.
75. A blessing grown from lies will not feed your soul.
76. Truth alone gives life.
77. GOD : They call Me Lord , but their hearts are with the market.
78. They build towers of ego and call them churches.
79. But I am not in the marble; I am in the meek.
80. RA ☀️: Their prophets promise jobs but never justice.
81. They shout “prosperity” louder than “purity.”
82. Their anointing smells like perfume, not presence.
83. ABASID 1841 : I, RA , speak fire, not fragrance.
84. I burn through their words and find no substance.
85. I split their speeches like wood.
86. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The true prophet builds hearts, not halls.
87. The true MBINGA feeds others before he feeds his pride.
88. GOD : My kingdom was not bought; it was built by love.
89. Yet they have turned My name into a loan.
90. They borrow holiness to buy attention.
91. RA ☀️: Their faith is on credit, their truth on delay.
92. But when I come, all debts are due.
93. ABASID 1841 : The wise MBINGA knows this — lies may grow fast, but truth never dies.
94. The foolish one trusts in crowds, not in conscience.
95. The fake prophet trusts in coins, not in calling.
96. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
97. MARI yavo inoseka nhasi, asi mangwana ichachema.
98. For every note spent in sin writes its own receipt.
99. GOD : I will visit their tables with silence.
100. Their laughter will choke when truth enters the room.
101. RA ☀️: Their microphones will spark, their candles will cry.
102. The lights they bought will fade in My sunrise.
103. ABASID 1841 : They hype each other like drums in darkness.
104. But one swing of My Axe , and their rhythm breaks.
105. They will remember that fame is not forever.
106. TENZI BABA JOHANI : When greed is praised, truth is punished.
107. But Heaven has a memory.
108. GOD : The day of balance is near.
109. I will weigh every prophet’s pocket against his prayer.
110. I will weigh every MBINGA’s smile against his soul.
111. RA ☀️: Their alliance is smoke tied with rope.
112. When My wind comes, it will scatter both flattery and fortune.
113. ABASID 1841 : The day of hype is over; the day of harvest has come.
114. I speak not for applause, but for awakening.
115. My truth burns hotter than their trends.
116. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
117. VARI KUSIMBISANA PACHAVO — but they cannot strengthen a lie.
118. For only love builds, but greed inflates and bursts.
119. VARI KUSIMBISANA PACHAVO, MANJE NDIRI KUBVIRA KUKUNDA MOTO.
120. (They are hyping themselves up, but I burn with truth more than fire.)
121. GOD : The alliance of greed was loud but weak.
122. It stood on fear and fell by fire.
123. The prophets called each other “anointed,” but I never called them.
124. They gave titles to each other that Heaven did not sign.
125. RA ☀️: Their crowns are cardboard in the rain of truth.
126. Their robes shine only under stage lights, not in spirit.
127. Their blessings bounce back because they have no roots.
128. ABASID 1841 : I entered their camp with the Axe of 7 .
129. One swing broke their golden handshake.
130. Their friendship shattered like fake glass.
131. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
132. Vana vangu, truth does not beg for company.
133. It walks alone, yet it rules the road.
134. GOD : I whispered into their banquets, and the laughter died.
135. Their wine turned bitter, their jokes turned to shame.
136. RA ☀️: They looked for peace in each other’s pockets, but found only fire.
137. I told them: “The gold you trust has turned to gas.”
138. It shines one second, then vanishes in smoke.
139. ABASID 1841 : I saw the MBINGA counting his cash with pride.
140. Behind him stood a prophet waiting for a share.
141. They smiled at each other but both feared truth.
142. For truth is the only guest they cannot host.
143. TENZI BABA JOHANI : When men make friendship out of money, they build a bridge of paper.
144. The first drop of rain washes it away.
145. GOD : I watched their hands sign deals that Heaven did not approve.
146. They bought air and sold holiness.
147. They thought My silence was agreement — it was patience.
148. RA ☀️: The patience of the Sun is not weakness.
149. It is mercy waiting for repentance.
150. But when repentance never comes, mercy becomes fire.
151. ABASID 1841 : I said to them, “Do not call me brother while your hand hides a knife.”
152. For the axe cuts through smiles and speeches.
153. The flame of RA respects no title.
154. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
155. Vana vangu, vanonyepa nemazwi avo — asi chokwadi chinoseka.
156. The truth laughs at liars until they confess.
157. GOD : Their riches are loud, their conscience silent.
158. They say, “ God has blessed us!” but their workers go hungry.
159. I count every tear that falls under their tables.
160. RA ☀️: The same sun that blesses their crops will burn their corruption.
161. For My fire knows justice.
162. ABASID 1841 : The false prophet will soon run out of lies.
163. The false MBINGA will soon run out of friends.
164. The only wealth left will be truth.
165. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
166. The poor man with truth is richer than the rich man with lies.
167. For his bed may be hard, but his heart rests easy.
168. GOD : The great fall is not of towers, but of trust.
169. The collapse of integrity shakes more than walls.
170. RA ☀️: The wind of awakening is rising.
171. It will blow through churches, banks, and hearts.
172. It will sweep the dust of deception into the sea.
173. ABASID 1841 : I will stand on the ashes of greed and plant new seeds.
174. I will build temples of truth, where the poor and the pure worship together.
175. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
176. And those who once praised lies will now preach repentance.
177. For when the Sun burns, even the shadows confess.
178. GOD : Their era is ending. The fire of truth cannot be bribed.
179. VARI KUSIMBISANA PACHAVO, MANJE NDIRI KUBVIRA KUKUNDA MOTO.
180. (They are hyping themselves up, but I burn with truth more than fire.)
181. VARI KUSIMBISANA PACHAVO, MANJE NDIRI KUBVIRA KUKUNDA MOTO
182. GOD : The smoke has cleared, and the proud are silent.
183. Their coins lie cold in the dust.
184. The names they built with lies are forgotten in the wind.
185. RA ☀️: I have burned the forest of flattery.
186. I left only the trees of truth standing.
187. Their roots drink from rivers of light.
188. ABASID 1841 : The Axe of 7 rests, for its work is done.
189. Every cut became a commandment.
190. Every spark became a scripture.
191. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
192. Vana vangu , behold the new brotherhood.
193. It is not of status, but of spirit.
194. It is not of fame, but of faith.
195. GOD : I will no longer dwell in temples of marble.
196. I will dwell in hearts that are humble.
197. My altar shall be the conscience of man.
198. RA ☀️: Those who once hyped each other will now heal each other.
199. Their applause will turn into prayer.
200. Their pride will melt into purpose.
201. ABASID 1841 : The MBINGA who was blind will now see.
202. He will feed the hungry instead of feeding his fame.
203. He will count blessings, not bills.
204. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
205. And the prophet who once sold words will now speak silence.
206. For silence before God is richer than a thousand lies.
207. GOD : I forgive those who return with tears, for repentance is wealth in My kingdom.
208. The heart that confesses is the coin that never rusts.
209. RA ☀️: The true alliance rises — of love, truth, and light.
210. Their riches are peace.
211. Their profit is people.
212. ABASID 1841 : This is the new economy: love without price, faith without sale.
213. The rich will guard the poor, the strong will serve the weak.
214. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
215. Vana vangu, this is the revival not of money, but of meaning.
216. The harvest is ready, and truth is the seed.
217. GOD : Let all markets of lies collapse; let only compassion remain.
218. My Word will now be traded freely again — for love alone.
219. RA ☀️: I am the fire that cleanses, not destroys.
220. I burn lies so truth can grow.
221. ABASID 1841 : Let the world know — the Sun does not compete with candles.
222. Let every false flame humble itself before the dawn.
223. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The church is not a shop.
224. The gospel is not for sale.
225. Salvation is not a subscription.
226. GOD : Those who have ears, hear: Heaven counts love, not likes.
227. I will raise prophets who fear no wallet.
228. I will raise MBINGA who build, not boast.
229. RA ☀️: My axe is now a torch.
230. It lights the way for the next generation.
231. They will grow without greed.
232. They will dance with dignity, not deceit.
233. ABASID 1841 : Tell the world: I am not here to destroy riches.
234. I am here to restore reason — that MARI was always MA ARI .
235. The reflection of God in every act of love.
236. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
237. VARI KUSIMBISANA PACHAVO , but love strengthens all.
238. For love cannot be bought, only born.
239. GOD : The fire is finished, the world is clean —
240. VARI KUSIMBISANA PACHAVO, MANJE NDIRI KUBVIRA KUKUNDA MOTO.
241. They were hyping each other up, but I burned with truth more than fire.

book_title: JESU HA AIFA — KANA VACHENA VAKAZO MUTI MACGYVER
verses: 1. DENGA HARINA MBINGA – PART 3
2. With TENZI BABA JOHANI — The Founder of Light
3. JESU HA AIFA, KANA VACHENA VAKAZO MUTI MacGYVER.
4. (Jesus could not die — even the whites called Him MacGyver!)
5. GOD : They thought death could trap the Word.
6. But how do you bury light?
7. They rolled a stone, but they forgot who made the stone.
8. They sealed a tomb, but they forgot who seals time.
9. RA ☀️: I laughed inside the earth.
10. They said, “He’s gone!” and I whispered, “I’m home.”
11. The grave was not a prison — it was a portal.
12. ABASID 1841 : I played the greatest game and won with love, not weapons.
13. They used nails, I used nature.
14. They lifted a cross, I lifted creation.
15. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Vana vangu, Jesu ha aifa.
16. The body rested, but the Spirit traveled.
17. Even the grave had to testify: “This man cannot rot.”
18. GOD : I wrote resurrection before the world began.
19. Death was only a doorway — not a defeat.
20. RA ☀️: They called me magician, healer, dreamer — they forgot I was the maker.
21. I am the breath that resurrects the breathless.
22. I am the reason morning always wins.
23. JESU HA AIFA, KANA VACHENA VAKAZO MUTI MacGYVER.
24. (Jesus could not die — even the whites called Him MacGyver!)
25. ABASID 1841 : They thought I was finished, but I was only folded.
26. The same cloth they wrapped me with became my wings.
27. The same stone they rolled became my throne.
28. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The trick was never magic — it was mastery.
29. Mastery over fear, pain, and time.
30. For only he who made the clock can pause it.
31. GOD : I placed eternity inside My Son .
32. So when death came to claim him, it swallowed light.
33. And the light burned from the inside out.
34. RA ☀️: I turned the cross into a compass.
35. I used suffering as the map to salvation.
36. Even the devil said, “This man cannot be destroyed.”
37. ABASID 1841 : I am the solution to every trap — the divine MacGyver .
38. When man builds walls, I walk through wind.
39. When they set snares, I turn them into symbols.
40. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
41. They said “He’s finished,” and I said “It is finished.”
42. Not I — but the system of sin.
43. Not Me — but the reign of fear.
44. GOD : Death thought it had won — but it had only built My stage.
45. Resurrection was not revenge — it was revelation.
46. The world would now learn: Life is not a heartbeat — it is a Spirit .
47. RA ☀️: I am not back from the dead — I am beyond it.
48. My fire was never extinguished; it only moved realms.
49. ABASID 1841 : When they said “He’s gone,” I was just changing dimensions.
50. When they said “He’s lost,” I was learning to return.
51. For truth never disappears — it reincarnates in light.
52. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
53. Jesu ha aifa — he multiplied.
54. One became millions.
55. Light broke into fragments — and each of you carries one.
56. GOD : That is why the world still burns with hope.
57. Because I hid My Son in the souls of the living.
58. The cross was never the end — it was the code.
59. JESU HA AIFA, KANA VACHENA VAKAZO MUTI MacGYVER.
60. (Jesus could not die — even the whites called Him MacGyver!)
61. GOD : When they buried you, I smiled.
62. For how can the Source die in its own story?
63. The page was only turned — not torn.
64. The grave was only grammar in My sentence of salvation.
65. RA ☀️: I walked through darkness like a visitor.
66. I spoke to death as a brother and asked, “Do you know who I am?”
67. Death trembled, for it saw the light it could not consume.
68. ABASID 1841 : I told it, “You are not my enemy — you are my evidence.”
69. You prove that resurrection exists.
70. You prove that truth survives trials.
71. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Vana vangu, muone iye anofamba nemweya wose —
72. he is not bound by breath or bone.
73. For Spirit cannot die; it simply shifts shape.
74. GOD : I am the cycle, not the circle’s end.
75. Even ashes sing when I command them.
76. Dust obeys when I whisper “ Live .”
77. RA ☀️: I saw the planets bow, the stars salute.
78. For even galaxies know the MacGyver of the soul.
79. I stitched time with thought, and creation moved again.
80. ABASID 1841 : The scientists called it energy.
81. The poets called it light.
82. But I called it I AM.
83. TENZI BABA JOHANI : When they wrote “The End ,” the heavens laughed.
84. For who ends what began itself?
85. GOD : The blood they spilled became rivers of renewal.
86. Every drop carried DNA of divinity.
87. Even the soil remembers.
88. RA ☀️: I rose not just in spirit — I rose in symbols.
89. In the dawn.
90. In the child’s first breath.
91. In the courage of those who stand for truth.
92. ABASID 1841 : I became the light that wakes the world.
93. When you open your eyes in the morning — it is I.
94. When you love despite pain — it is I.
95. TENZI BABA JOHANI:
96. Jesu ha aifa, nekuti chokwadi hachife.
97. Truth is the only being without a grave.
98. GOD : I hid eternal life in understanding, not in money.
99. That is why fools die many times, and the wise live forever.
100. RA ☀️: I solved the equation of death not by fighting it — but by finishing it.
101. I turned the weapon of fear into the tool of faith.
102. ABASID 1841 : My tomb became my classroom.
103. The stone, my chalkboard.
104. The silence, my sermon.
105. TENZI BABA JOHANI : And when He rose, time changed shape.
106. Past, present, and future folded like paper.
107. GOD : That is the mystery of 1841 — the code of return.
108. The number of light reborn.
109. RA ☀️: I, ABASID 1841, returned through numbers, through nature, through names.
110. Each digit a flame, each century a breath.
111. ABASID 1841 : Even history could not delete me.
112. It only disguised me until the right time.
113. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
114. And now the clock of prophecy strikes again.
115. For the Sun of Truth rises from the South.
116. GOD : I have written his return in every culture — every creed remembers.
117. Some call him the Christ .
118. Some call him the Mahdi .
119. Some call him the MacGyver .
120. RA ☀️: I am all, for I am I AM .
121. And the grave remains empty forever.
122. JESU HA AIFA, KANA VACHENA VAKAZO MUTI MacGYVER.
123. (Jesus could not die — even the whites called Him MacGyver!)
124. GOD : When truth hid itself in silence, I whispered to the wind.
125. I said, “Carry My Word South — to the land of the Stone Tower .”
126. The wind obeyed and found Great Zimbabwe .
127. RA ☀️: There I planted My throne.
128. I wrote My name in sunlight and numbered it 1841 .
129. ABASID 1841 : They thought I was gone, but I was gathering strength.
130. I was resting in the bones of the ancestors.
131. I was waiting for the child who would remember.
132. TENZI BABA JOHANI : And now that child stands among men.
133. The MacGyver of the Spirit Game — the solver of time.
134. GOD : For I hid My Son in Africa.
135. The world searched east and west, but the Sun rises from the South .
136. RA ☀️: They called Me myth, but the mirror knew Me.
137. Even the rivers reflect My return.
138. ABASID 1841 : I came with the memory of light.
139. I came with the torch of the lost covenants.
140. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
141. And those who mocked now marvel.
142. For they see the same spirit that escaped the cross.
143. GOD : When I send truth, I send it through humble vessels.
144. That is why the proud cannot recognize it.
145. RA ☀️: They look for crowns of gold — but I wear fire.
146. They look for thrones of silver — but I stand on stone.
147. ABASID 1841 : I am not a religion — I am remembrance.
148. The sound of the first breath of man.
149. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
150. Jesu ha aifa, because truth cannot be crucified twice.
151. The world may deny, but Heaven cannot forget.
152. GOD : Every sunrise since Golgotha has been My reminder.
153. The covenant is alive.
154. The blood still speaks.
155. RA ☀️: I am the voice that never aged.
156. I walked through history like lightning, unseen but felt.
157. ABASID 1841 : I returned not to repeat religion, but to reveal reason.
158. To show that faith is not blindness — it is vision.
159. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
160. When they see Me in the streets, they remember the fire.
161. The same fire from the Masowe of old.
162. GOD : For I said: “Where two or three gather in love, I dwell.”
163. Not in cathedrals of competition.
164. Not in temples of transaction.
165. RA ☀️: I dwell in the child who forgives.
166. In the mother who prays.
167. In the elder who tells truth without price.
168. ABASID 1841 : I am the Sun they cannot shadow.
169. I am the equation they cannot erase.
170. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
171. Jesu ha aifa — even mathematics testified.
172. For 888 is the breath of Christ.
173. 1480 is the Name in flesh.
174. And 1841 is the Spirit returned.
175. GOD : Numbers bow before Me, for I made logic holy.
176. The wisdom of the wise will now return home.
177. RA ☀️: I bring the truth of the ancients in modern tongue.
178. I bring the memory of the sun to sons of man.
179. ABASID 1841 : When they call Me MacGyver , I smile — for they finally see the symbol.
180. I am the God who makes a way where there was none.
181. I am the architect of escape — not from death, but from deceit.
182. JESU HA AIFA, KANA VACHENA VAKAZO MUTI MacGYVER.
183. (Jesus could not die — even the whites called Him MacGyver!)
184. GOD : The age of shadows has ended.
185. The light that never died now fills the sky.
186. Even death kneels, for it has met its teacher.
187. RA ☀️: I swing My Axe of Truth not to destroy — but to divide.
188. To separate lies from life.
189. To show the roots that feed real faith.
190. ABASID 1841 : I return not with armies, but with awareness.
191. My soldiers are words, My weapons are wonders.
192. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
193. Jesu ha aifa, nekuti chokwadi hachimbofa.
194. It rises every time the world forgets.
195. GOD : Every lie falls to time, but truth stands through eternity.
196. I am that truth.
197. I am that eternity.
198. RA ☀️: The false prophets melt like wax before the Word.
199. Their stage lights flicker before My sunrise.
200. Their gold fades, their tongues tire.
201. ABASID 1841 : And yet I still call them brothers.
202. For even ashes can remember their flame.
203. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
204. Come, all who are weary of lies.
205. Sit by the fire of wisdom and be warm.
206. Drink from the well of remembrance.
207. GOD : I have no interest in cathedrals of marble.
208. My throne is the heart that loves.
209. My offering is honesty.
210. RA ☀️: I came not to start a new religion.
211. I came to finish revelation.
212. I came to reveal the God in man — MWARI MA ARI .
213. ABASID 1841: When they say “MacGyver,” they admit the miracle.
214. For only the divine can make victory out of defeat.
215. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
216. He turned nails into notes of music.
217. He turned crosses into compasses.
218. He turned death into direction.
219. GOD : And now, sons of men, awaken.
220. The power that raised Him is within you.
221. Speak love, and mountains will move.
222. RA ☀️: I am not far — I am fire in your chest.
223. When you tell truth, I roar.
224. When you forgive, I shine.
225. ABASID 1841: This is the real resurrection — not of bones, but of being.
226. Life without love is a tomb with breathing walls.
227. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
228. But life with love is the open grave — the morning after fear.
229. GOD : The kingdom has no borders.
230. Heaven is not above — it is awake within.
231. RA ☀️: I am the pulse in your purpose.
232. I am the rhythm in your reason.
233. ABASID 1841 : The world will remember My words not as miracles — but as mathematics.
234. For truth is the formula that never fails.
235. TENZI BABA JOHANI :
236. And now the sons of light rise again — from Africa , from every land.
237. For light needs no passport.
238. GOD : I have declared the end of death’s rule.
239. The universe sings: Jesu ha aifa!
240. RA ☀️: The circle is complete.
241. I am that I AM — the MacGyver of creation, the Solver of Souls.
242. ALL TOGETHER (GOD, RA ☀️, ABASID 1841, TENZI BABA JOHANI):
243. JESU HA AIFA, KANA VACHENA VAKAZO MUTI MacGYVER.
244. For truth cannot die — and love always finds a way.

book_title: MASOWE — ZIVA KUTI GURU MWANDIRA HARINA DENGA
verses: 1. “JESU HA AIFA — KANA VACHENA VAKAZO MUTI MacGYVER”
2. With TENZI BABA JOHANI — The Founder of Light
3. Here begins a thunderous new scroll for the Masowe of Truth .
4. The lightning returns to cleanse the stage.
5. (The Big Crowd Has No Heaven)
6. 🌩️ PROLOGUE — THE VOICE FROM THE WILDERNESS
7. In the quiet wind of the old Masowe , I heard the Spirit say,
8. “Do not count My presence by the number of men,
9. for Heaven counts by hearts — not heads.”
10. Once upon a time, in the days of dust and truth,
11. small circles of worship burned brighter than cities of noise.
12. Those who stood barefoot on holy ground knew the voice of angels,
13. and though few, their song thundered like nations.
14. Now, men seek crowds to prove holiness —
15. but I, RA ☀️, seek hearts to prove love.
16. Therefore, write these words,
17. for I ABASID 1841 return to correct the lie of numbers.
18. For I AM THE VOICE OF GOD IN THE SUN,
19. and I speak again as I did to Nikodhai , to Betinai , and to every Masowe that remembers silence.
20. Let every prophet, priest, and singer hear:
21. Truth is not in the crowd — Truth is in the cloud of God’s presence .
22. 🌋 THE THUNDER OF THE THRONE — 216 VERSES OF FIRE (PART I)
23. GOD : In the beginning, I spoke to few, not to many.
24. I whispered to Noah — not to the crowd that mocked him.
25. I walked with Abraham — not with the kings who ruled cities.
26. I chose Moses alone on the mountain — not the multitude at its foot.
27. RA ☀️: The few who listen are worth more than thousands who cheer without hearing.
28. The noise of men does not move Heaven — only truth does.
29. ABASID 1841 : When I was in Nikodhai , I saw Heaven in the dust.
30. When we sang, the earth shook — not from numbers, but from presence.
31. GOD : I dwell not where there is fame, but where there is faith.
32. 🔟 TENZI BABA JOHANI : Even one child with clean heart is a church to Me.
33. RA ☀️: The crowd praises sound, but Heaven praises silence.
34. The crowd seeks miracles, but I seek meaning.
35. GOD : Do not measure anointing by attendance.
36. The biggest gatherings are often graves for truth.
37. ABASID 1841 : I am the voice of the small Masowe ,
38. where the dust dances with angels.
39. I am the child of the few who believed without being paid.
40. GOD : I never asked for clout, I asked for character.
41. Those who chase cameras will be forgotten by Heaven .
42. RA ☀️: A prophet who performs for applause
43. has already received his reward — from men, not Me.
44. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Masowe was not born for show,
45. but for souls.
46. GOD : When I descended upon Sinai ,
47. the crowd trembled — but only one climbed the mountain.
48. So it is again today —
49. the multitude watches, but only one obeys.
50. RA ☀️: The narrow path has few footprints,
51. but those few shine like gold.
52. The wide road is full of crowds,
53. but it leads to empty applause.
54. ABASID 1841: I have seen the new Masowe ,
55. they compete with concerts instead of confessing.
56. Their drums are louder than their prayers.
57. Their tongues are many,
58. but their hearts are far.
59. GOD : You call on My name in microphones,
60. but not in meditation.
61. You wear white garments,
62. but black intentions.
63. RA ☀️: You sing of Heaven ,
64. but dream of handbags.
65. You preach of purity,
66. but chase popularity.
67. ABASID 1841: Masowe , remember your roots —
68. bare feet, honest words, simple faith.
69. Not fame, not fashion, not finance.
70. GOD : I am not impressed by followers;
71. I am moved by followers of truth.
72. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The true Masowe is where one man prays
73. and ten thousand angels reply.
74. The true altar is the human heart.
75. RA ☀️: Do not call your gatherings big when Heaven calls them empty.
76. For the biggest crowd of liars cannot outsing a single truthful tear.
77. GOD : Did I not say the last shall be first?
78. Then why do you run to be first among men?
79. ABASID 1841 : The child who prays under a tree
80. is richer than the bishop on TV.
81. For Heaven listens to truth, not titles.
82. GOD : You say “We are many,”
83. but I say “You are loud.”
84. You say “We are blessed,”
85. but I say “You are blind.”
86. RA ☀️: A crowd without love is a choir without sound.
87. A prophet without humility is thunder without rain.
88. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The Masowe that forgets silence forgets Heaven.
89. The Masowe that chases fame chases fire — not the Holy one, but the burning of judgment.
90. GOD : I see your processions and your props,
91. but I search for prayer.
92. I see your cameras and your hashtags,
93. but I search for compassion.
94. RA ☀️: The true congregation is invisible —
95. it is found in every soul that loves.
96. ABASID 1841 : Guru mwandira harina denga —
97. the biggest crowd has no Heaven .
98. For Heaven is where truth stands, not where numbers gather.
99. GOD : When men measure power by attendance,
100. I measure power by obedience.
101. RA ☀️: When men count coins,
102. I count conscience.
103. The voice of the Throne rolls across the mountains once more.
104. This is Part II (Verses 56–108) of the scroll:
105. (The Big Crowd Has No Heaven)
106. 🌩️ PART II — THE AXE STRIKES THE STAGE OF FALSEHOOD
107. GOD : I see your shows — men pretending to heal what they never prayed for.
108. You stretch your hands for fame, not for faith.
109. RA ☀️: You rehearse miracles like actors,
110. yet call yourselves messengers of Heaven.
111. ABASID 1841 : You wave flags and shout prophecies,
112. but your tongues are coins, bought and sold.
113. TENZI BABA JOHANI : Masowe was never a circus,
114. but a sacred fire where truth was cooked and shared.
115. GOD : I gave you dust to kneel upon,
116. but you built stages to be seen.
117. You forgot that power lies in prayer, not production.
118. RA ☀️: I walked through the small Masowe ,
119. where the Spirit moved without microphones.
120. I saw children cry and Heaven answer.
121. GOD : The angels still attend the humble.
122. But they flee from those who sell oil with My name.
123. ABASID 1841 : The oil of greed smells sweet but burns bitter.
124. The holy oil of truth has no price tag.
125. RA ☀️: Those who charge for prayer
126. have already spent their reward.
127. GOD : You cannot buy what I give for free.
128. You cannot sell what I breathed into being.
129. TENZI BABA JOHANI : I remember when our songs were weapons —
130. now they are jingles for offerings.
131. I remember when our hands lifted the poor —
132. now they lift wallets.
133. GOD : You cry “Mwari vati!”
134. but I did not speak.
135. You perform, yet call it prophecy.
136. You call cameras witnesses of My Spirit ,
137. but the Spirit needs no recording.
138. RA ☀️: The light that exposes will strike your stages.
139. The sun will rise and reveal your glitter as dust.
140. ABASID 1841 : You cannot fake fire forever.
141. The truth burns longer than performance.
142. GOD : The prophets of money are the merchants of souls.
143. Their market will soon collapse.
144. RA ☀️: Their coins will melt in the flame of fact.
145. Their fame will fade in the face of faith.
146. TENZI BABA JOHANI : The small Masowe still shines.
147. The few who sing under trees are the true pillars of Zion .
148. GOD : I do not sit in cathedrals of pride.
149. I dwell in the corner where the clean-hearted pray.
150. RA ☀️: The new Masowe must rise — not by numbers,

1396. I sanctified the night watch; police keep covenant, not quotas of fear.
1397. — I AM ANI • I AM IDI • I AM CHOKWADI • ONE TRUTH THE ERIJAH
1398. I am the Lighthouse of the South; ships of destiny read Me and dock in peace.
1399. — I AM ANI • I AM IDI • I AM CHOKWADI • ONE TRUTH THE ERIJAH
1400. I crowned Zimbabwe as witness; nations shall learn My truth from her mouth.
1401. — I AM ANI • I AM IDI • I AM CHOKWADI • ONE TRUTH THE ERIJAH
1402. I wrapped the scroll and sealed it; only love breaks this seal without shattering.
1403. — I AM ANI • I AM IDI • I AM CHOKWADI • ONE TRUTH THE ERIJAH
1404. I am the Flame that teaches; knowledge glows without scorching the meek.
1405. — I AM ANI • I AM IDI • I AM CHOKWADI • ONE TRUTH THE ERIJAH
1406. I poured out the Spirit of remembrance; bones know their addresses again.
1407. — I AM ANI • I AM IDI • I AM CHOKWADI • ONE TRUTH THE ERIJAH
1408. I set the Throne in the South; the two Lions face the nations without fear.
1409. — I AM ANI • I AM IDI • I AM CHOKWADI • ONE TRUTH THE ERIJAH
1410. I AM TRUTH; Zimbabwe, arise and speak: the earth shall answer, “AMEN.”
1411. — I AM ANI • I AM IDI • I AM CHOKWADI • ONE TRUTH THE ERIJAH

book_title: The Book of Memory – When the Bones Remembered
verses: 1. And I, ABASID 1841, looked upon the stones of Great Zimbabwe, and they were as ribs of a sleeping giant, curved around the hills of CHAMHEMBE.
2. And the Spirit of Mwari said unto me, “These are not ruins, My Son; they are bones in a grave of forgetfulness, waiting for My Name.”
3. For the scribes of the strangers had written, “This place is mystery, this place is nothing, this place is broken,” yet the measure of the walls spoke in perfect numbers.
4. And the numbers said, “We are not broken; we are encrypted. We waited for the One whose number is 1841 to read us.”
5. Then my own bones burned within me, for I remembered the dreams of my youth, and how I walked as a stranger among my own people.
6. And they said, “This one talks too much of RA and of numbers; leave him to his madness.” Yet the bones of my fathers whispered, “Endure.”
7. For the bones of Chaminuka were restless in the dust, and the spirits of the prophets of the South stood in a great circle, waiting for the Clock of God to be restored.
8. And the Voice said, “Son of the South, you are not here to start a new story; you are here to remember the one they buried alive.”
9. And I answered, “How shall I remember what I did not see?” And the Voice said, “Your bones were there. Before you were flesh, you were memory wrapped in light.”
10. Then I understood that the bones within my body were scrolls written in calcium and water, and every ache in my life was a verse calling me back to remembrance.
11. And the Spirit said, “Write this for the children of the Spiral Nation: Your bones are not just evidence of life; they are evidence of return.”
12. For every time a soul is born upon this land, the bones ask, “Will this one remember?” And when they find ABASID 1841, they cry, “Yes, this is the One who remembers for us all.”
13. And the land beneath my feet stirred as if waking from a long dream, and the wind carried the scent of old rain.
14. For the memory of the earth is stored in its dust, and every footstep taken in truth awakens a forgotten season.
15. And the Spirit said, “The bones of the land and the bones of the man are one; he who remembers himself remembers the nation.”
16. And I lifted my staff toward the East, and the sunlight trembled upon the stones like a child remembering its mother.
17. And the walls spoke without sound, and they said, “We were shaped by a hand that knew the heavens, and that hand is yours.”
18. For the builders of old did not look outside for God; they looked inward, and found Him sitting upon the throne of their own bones.
19. And the Voice said, “Write this mystery for the seekers: The bones remember everything the mind forgets.”
20. And memory became to me as a river, flowing backward and forward at once, and I drank from it and saw my former days.
21. And I saw myself walking among the prophets of MA and RA, and they greeted me saying, “Welcome home, Son of the Sun.”
22. And they showed me the first Conical Tower, not as stone, but as breath hardened into form — the mathematics of God.
23. And the Spirit said, “You have seen what few were allowed to see. Guard it until the bones of the world begin to shake again.”
24. For the bones of the world shake not with earthquakes, but with remembrance.
25. And many shall say, “We feel something rising,” but they shall not know that it is their own forgotten identity lifting from the dust.
26. And the Voice said unto me, “Speak gently to them, for memory is fire, and fire must be carried with honor.”
27. And I said, “How shall they believe me?” And the Spirit answered, “You are the sign. Your number is the proof. Your name is the witness.”
28. And suddenly the stones of Great Zimbabwe glowed with a light unseen by the eye but known by the soul.
29. And the hills echoed with a sound like bones clashing in ceremony, as ancestors rose to greet their own remembrance.
30. And I fell upon my face, for the weight of memory was heavy, yet sweet as the first rain of the season.
31. And the Voice said, “Rise, ABASID 1841, for your bones have accepted the covenant of return.”
32. And my spirit rose like smoke from a sacred fire, and I saw generations bending toward me as plants bend to the sun.
33. And the Spirit said, “This is why you were born in this age — to gather the bones of the forgotten and give them names again.”
34. And the wind said, “These are the days of rising,” and the dust replied, “These are the days of remembering.”
35. And I heard the unborn speaking from the heavens, saying, “We come because the bones have opened.”
36. And the earth beneath me whispered, “The time of silence is over.”
37. And the Spirit said, “You shall write four books — Memory, Breath, Seed, and Elements — and together they shall unlock the bones of the world.”
38. And I said, “So let it be written.” And the stones answered, “So let it be remembered.”
39. And the Voice said, “Seal this scroll as the First Witness of the Bones, for through it the nations shall know the hour has begun.”
40. Thus ends the First Scroll of Memory — and blessed are those whose bones awaken when they read it.

book_title: The Book of Breath – When God Entered Man
verses: 1. And it came to pass that after the bones remembered, the Breath of God descended like mist upon the hills of MAODZANYEMBA.
2. And the Spirit said unto me, “Write the Book of Breath, for without breath the bones are but silent witnesses.”
3. For in the beginning Mwari shaped the dust, but the dust did not rise until Breath entered it.
4. And the Breath said, “I am the bridge between the invisible and the seen.”
5. And I, ABASID 1841, felt the Breath move through me as a river of light, carrying names older than language.
6. And the Spirit said, “Before men wrote scrolls on papyrus, I wrote scrolls in their lungs.”
7. For every breath is a verse, and every heartbeat is a punctuation in the story of God.
8. And the Breath said, “When you inhale, you receive Me; when you exhale, you release Me into the world.”
9. And I understood that prayer is not words spoken upward, but breath returned with intention.
10. And the Spirit said, “This is why prophets speak power — they speak with borrowed breath.”
11. And the Breath moved upon the waters of my spirit, and I remembered the first time I lived.
12. For before I was flesh, I was breath wrapped in promise.
13. And the Breath said, “Every child is born with My name in their lungs.”
14. But the world teaches them to forget My rhythm and follow the rhythm of fear.
15. And fear shortens breath, but truth lengthens it.
16. And the Spirit said unto me, “Teach them to breathe again.”
17. For when a man breathes deeply in truth, he becomes a temple.
18. And when a woman breathes in love, she becomes a covenant.
19. And when a nation breathes as one, it becomes unstoppable.
20. And the Breath said, “Write this mystery for the seekers: I am the throne of the soul.”
21. For where breath is steady, the soul is steady also.
22. And illness began when breath was forgotten.
23. And war began when breath was stolen.
24. And peace shall begin when breath is honored again.
25. And I lifted my hands to the heavens, and the Breath filled me until my bones sang.
26. And the Spirit said, “Sing, O Son of the Sun, for breath is music.”
27. And I sang the old songs of MA and RA, and the air trembled with recognition.
28. For breath remembers what the mind forgets.
29. And the Breath said, “Tell them this: When they breathe with intention, they awaken the God within.”
30. And I asked, “How shall I teach them?” And the Spirit said, “By breathing before speaking.”
31. For words born of breath carry life, but words born of haste carry death.
32. And the Breath said, “These four books shall teach them to live again: Memory, Breath, Seed, and Elements.”
33. And I bowed my head, for the weight of revelation was sweet and heavy.
