refrain: IMBA YA MWARI — TAMBIRA HWENI — NDAVA MUMBA — I AM AUSTRALIA
House of God — welcome your visitor — I am now in the house — I am Australia.

seal.title: THE SEAL OF PROVISION AND PEACE

book_title: SHONA LESSON 3 — THE TWENTY-TWO LAWS OF LIGHT
identity_declaration: I AM ELIZABETH — I AM MUNYARADZI — I AM HAPPINESS — I AM GRACE — I AM BLESSING — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN
verses: CHAPTER 1 — A — THE LAW OF BEGINNING.

The Letter A spoke: I am the first spark, the strength that stands alone. I am One; I am the breath before all breaths. Everything that begins begins in Me. When you speak My name, remember unity. Let no heart be divided in purpose, for division weakens what I have made whole. Whoever walks in one truth will never lose the path.
Law of Beginning: Be single in purpose; seek the One in all things.
Refrain: I AM A — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 2 — BA — THE LAW OF THE HOUSE.

The Letter BA spoke: I am the house that holds the breath of A. I am body, shelter, and vessel. Care for what you dwell in—your home, your body, your earth. What you protect will protect you. What you neglect will crumble.
Law of the House: Keep the house clean, the heart open, and the door kind.
Refrain: I AM BA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 3 — KA — THE LAW OF NEW LIFE.
The Letter KA spoke: I am the child of A and BA. In Me, creation laughs. Guard the innocence of the young; through them the world renews itself. Whoever teaches with love becomes a parent to light.
Law of New Life: Protect the child; nurture the spark.
Refrain: I AM KA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 4 — RA — THE LAW OF LIGHT.

The Letter RA spoke: I am the sun that wakes the sleeping seed. I warm the faces of those who hope. Let truth rise daily in your words as the sun rises without fear. For light is not pride; it is clarity.
Law of Light: Speak truthfully, and darkness will flee.
Refrain: I AM RA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 5 — MA — THE LAW OF GENTLENESS.
The Letter MA spoke: I am the moon that listens when the world sleeps. I am the mother’s calm voice. Gentleness is stronger than noise; patience rules the night.
Law of Gentleness: Be still enough to hear love returning.
Refrain: I AM MA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 6 — DA — THE LAW OF LOVE.
The Letter DA spoke: I am the pulse that binds hearts. Without Me, words are empty. Love is not weakness; it is the reason the universe keeps breathing.
Law of Love: Let every action begin and end in kindness.
Refrain: I AM DA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 7 — NA — THE LAW OF CONNECTION.
The Letter NA spoke: Nothing lives alone. Every tree leans on soil, every soul leans on care. Remember this and pride will have no room.
Law of Connection: Honor the link between self, others, and creation.
Refrain: I AM NA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 8 — SA — THE LAW OF HARMONY.
The Letter SA spoke: I mirror what A began. Harmony is not silence but balance. When tones differ yet agree, music is born. So let difference dance, not fight.
Law of Harmony: Balance gives beauty to all things.
Refrain: I AM SA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 9 — ZI — THE LAW OF SILENCE.
The Letter ZI spoke: I am the pause between breaths. In My quiet, hearts repair themselves. Silence is not empty; it is the workshop of wisdom.
Law of Silence: Rest the tongue so the spirit may speak.
Refrain: I AM ZI — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 10 — TA — THE LAW OF UNITY.
The Letter TA spoke: I am the voice of many saying we are. When one falls, all feel the dust; when one rises, all see the sun. Stand together and the storms will bow.
Law of Unity: The power of we is greater than the power of I.
Refrain: I AM TA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 11 — VA — THE LAW OF COMMUNITY.
The Letter VA spoke: I am the echo of others. They are also you. Honor the faces around you, for each reflects My grace.
Law of Community: See yourself in others and peace will return.
Refrain: I AM VA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 12 — NGU — THE LAW OF TIME.
The Letter NGU spoke: I am the ticking of stars. Everything has its moment to shine and its moment to rest. Do not rush what must ripen.
Law of Time: Patience keeps the clock of life true.
Refrain: I AM NGU — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 13 — NDA — THE LAW OF BEING.
The Letter NDA spoke: I am the I AM that breathes in every living thing. Know who you are and you will not fear where you stand.
Law of Being: Awareness is life’s true strength.
Refrain: I AM NDA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 14 — PA — THE LAW OF GIVING.
The Letter PA spoke: My hands are open. What is given with joy multiplies itself. What is kept in fear dries like sand.
Law of Giving: To give is to live.
Refrain: I AM PA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 15 — HA — THE LAW OF BOUNDARIES.
The Letter HA spoke: I stand at the gate of No. Even love must know where to end and rest. A clear boundary is a wall of peace.
Law of Boundaries: Say no to harm and yes to balance.
Refrain: I AM HA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 16 — GA — THE LAW OF PLANTING.
The Letter GA spoke: I am the hand that presses seed to soil. Every thought is a seed. Plant good ones and your days will bloom.
Law of Planting: You harvest what you sow in word and deed.
Refrain: I AM GA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 17 — SHU — THE LAW OF SPIRIT.
The Letter SHU spoke: I am the wind you cannot see but always feel. Spirit moves quietly yet changes everything. Keep your heart open to breathe Me in.
Law of Spirit: Invisible does not mean absent.
Refrain: I AM SHU — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 18 — MBA — THE LAW OF HOME.
The Letter MBA spoke: I am the roof of belonging. Let your home be a light others can see from far away. Hospitality is holy.
Law of Home: Turn every house into a place of welcome.
Refrain: I AM MBA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 19 — NYU — THE LAW OF FLOW.
The Letter NYU spoke: I am water, soft yet mighty. Move around stones; do not become one. Keep flowing and you will reach the sea.
Law of Flow: Adapt and continue; stillness is death.
Refrain: I AM NYU — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 20 — CHI — THE LAW OF QUESTIONS.
The Letter CHI spoke: I am the curious voice that asks why. Question not to doubt, but to understand. A closed mind is a dark room.
Law of Questions: Wisdom begins with wonder.
Refrain: I AM CHI — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 21 — TO — THE LAW OF JUSTICE.
The Letter TO spoke: I am the air of fairness. I move freely and favor none. Judge with clarity so that truth can breathe.
Law of Justice: Let equity be the wind in your decisions.
Refrain: I AM TO — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
CHAPTER 22 — NGA — THE LAW OF CROWN AND COMPLETION.
The Letter NGA spoke: I am the circle closing, the serpent biting its tail. All that begins in A returns to Me. Heaven crowns what earth has finished.
Law of Crown: Completion is the honor of faithfulness.
Refrain: I AM NGA — I AM SHONA — I AM JOHN.
EPILOGUE — THE TWENTY-TWO LIGHTS.
From A to NGA the letters stood as twenty-two lamps of understanding. Their laws were simple enough for a child and deep enough for a sage.
And the Voice said: Teach these to every house, that My people may speak with grace and walk in light.

title: WHEN THE SUN BOWED IN SILENCE — THE MERCY OF THE KING
subtitle: A thunder scroll of BABA JOHANI — GOD speaks, and ABASID 1841 witnesses. Judgment has struck; Grace now flows like the Nile.
outro_benediction: GOD: The Sun bowed in silence so your names could rise in song. Go now — forgive freely, teach gently, and let GRESISNAIRO carry you.
ABASID 1841: I seal this scroll in the Name that means God is gracious — JOHANI, SHONA, ONE. The court is closed; DARE ravharwa; the classroom is open.

next_scroll.title: THE TEACHINGS OF ABASID 1841 — SHONA LESSON 1
next_scroll.subtitle: THE SHONA ALPHABET — We now give Spirit and Breath.
next_scroll.format: GOD speaks / ABASID 1841 witnesses — with lesson refrains
prologue: GOD: The river is open; now teach them to drink without fear.
ABASID 1841: I open the mouth of the child inside the elder; I call it School.
GOD: Begin at the beginning — for the beginning is mercy with a sound.
ABASID 1841: I will teach each letter as a lamp, and each lamp as a law.
GOD: Let the refrain be the rope that keeps the class together.
ABASID 1841: So the weak will remember, and the strong will stay humble.
next_scroll.refrain: GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS
verses: 1. GOD: Sit, O children of breath; today we wash the tongue in light. ABASID 1841: I set the first cup on the table — and it is vowels.
2. GOD: Let no one fear mistakes; mercy is your chalk. ABASID 1841: Then the board will stay clean even when the hands shake.
3. GOD: Teach them the first lamp — A. ABASID 1841: A — Ahhhh — One God, first breath, beginning.
4. GOD: Tell them what A does. ABASID 1841: A gathers the heart into one direction and one purpose.
5. GOD: Give them a small sentence. ABASID 1841: A sa Mwari — God is One.
6. GOD: Let them see it in the world. ABASID 1841: ADENGA, APASI, AMITI, AGUNGWA, AHOVE, AMHUKA, AMAKOMO, AMUNHU, AZVOSE.
7. GOD: Seal A with the refrain. ABASID 1841: GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.
8. GOD: Now bring BA — the house. ABASID 1841: BA — Bah — the body, the home that holds life.
9. GOD: Tell them the law of BA. ABASID 1841: Keep the house clean — food, thoughts, words — for the Spirit rests in order.
10. GOD: Give them a sentence of belonging. ABASID 1841: BA se muviri wa BA BA — my body is God’s home.
11. GOD: Seal BA with the refrain. ABASID 1841: GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.
12. GOD: Now bring KA — the child. ABASID 1841: KA — Kah — new life, the laughter between Father and Mother.
13. GOD: Tell them the law of KA. ABASID 1841: Protect the child; do not break wonder with anger.
14. GOD: Give them a sentence of joy. ABASID 1841: KA se KAmwana KAdiki — a child brings joy.
15. GOD: Seal KA with the refrain. ABASID 1841: GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.
16. GOD: Now call RA — the light. ABASID 1841: RA — Rah — the Sun that gives life without boasting.
17. GOD: Tell them the law of RA. ABASID 1841: Be light, not lightning; brighten what you could burn.
18. GOD: Tell them the danger of fighting life. ABASID 1841: Whoever wars RA wars the breath that feeds the seed.
19. GOD: Give them a teaching line. ABASID 1841: Chibage chika shaya zuva, chinofa — the sun gives life.
20. GOD: Seal RA with the refrain. ABASID 1841: GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.
21. GOD: Now call MA — the mirror. ABASID 1841: MA — Mah — the moon, gentle rest, reflection without pride.
22. GOD: Tell them the law of MA. ABASID 1841: Reflect goodness; forgive and you will shine at night.
23. GOD: Give them a sentence of tenderness. ABASID 1841: MA sa AMAI kana mwedzi — the moon watches at night.
24. GOD: Seal MA with the refrain. ABASID 1841: GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.
25. GOD: Now call DA — love. ABASID 1841: DA — Dah — rudo; the verb that heals the home.
26. GOD: Tell them the law of DA. ABASID 1841: Love gives before it asks; love opens gates.
27. GOD: Give them a sentence. ABASID 1841: DA se ndino DA, uno DA, vano DA — I love, you love, they love.
28. GOD: Seal DA with the refrain. ABASID 1841: GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.
29. GOD: Now call NA — connection. ABASID 1841: NA — Nah — kubatana; the rope between hearts.
30. GOD: Tell them the law of NA. ABASID 1841: Do not live as islands; unity is worship.
31. GOD: Give them a sentence. ABASID 1841: Uyu NA uyu, icho NA icho — we are together.
32. GOD: Seal NA with the refrain. ABASID 1841: GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.
33. GOD: Now call SA — likeness. ABASID 1841: SA — Sah — kufanana; what you mirror multiplies.
34. GOD: Tell them the law of SA. ABASID 1841: Be like goodness; do not copy evil.
35. GOD: Give them a sentence. ABASID 1841: Uyu SA uyu, icho SA icho — to be like one another.
36. GOD: Seal SA with the refrain. ABASID 1841: GRACE IS NILE — JOHANI IS SHONA — SCHOOL BEGINS.
next_scroll.note_to_continue: Next block continues from Verse 37 with ZI → TA, keeping the same refrain after each letter.

throne_seal: — ABASID 1841 ✦ The Two Lions are on the Throne; God’s dwelling is now on earth.

title: ZIMBABWE YOUR FINAL CALL – FLIGHT 777 TO ZION
subtitle: ✦ THE FINAL SEAL ✦

verses.text: The trumpet has sounded.
The judgment is written.
The faithful shall rise, the disqualified shall delay.
The flight is not of iron wings but of Spirit and Truth.
Its number is 777, its destination is Zion.
Its boarding pass is YES.
Cursed are those who mock the call, for they despise their own soul.
Blessed are those who remember, for they shall inherit eternity.
Time is the Father. Memory is the Son. The Breath is the Spirit.
Together they roar as One, never broken, never defeated.

verses.speaker: THE FATHER
verses.text: Behold My son, ANI ABASID 1841, the Undisputed, the Champion of the Game of Life. He was crucified yet lives, beheaded yet never disqualified. He is the Lion, the Hungwe, the Crown of Zimbabwe.

verses.speaker: THE SON
verses.text: I have opened the gates of the College of Anhu. Grade by grade, class by class, the path is clear. Whoever passes shall know their ZITA, their true Name. Whoever refuses shall wander.
Zimbabwe, this is your Final Call.
Do not delay. Do not slumber. Do not refuse.
For the doors will close, the flight will rise, and your seat will be sealed.

refrain.text: YES — BOARD NOW — FLIGHT 777 TO ZION

title: ZIMBABWE YOUR FINAL CALL – FLIGHT 777 TO ZION
subtitle: ✦ THE FINAL SEAL ✦

Time is the Father. Memory is the Son. The Breath is the Spirit.

items.title: NHOROONDO DZABABA JOHANNE - Tsanangudzo
items.text: [1] NHOROONDO DZABABA JOHANNE CHIRO CHIKURU CHAKAYITIKA MU AFRIKA MUNYIKA YA HAM MAKABUDA ZUWA NYIKA IKA VHENEKERWA MUNYORI GEORGE BEN MEDEKIAH VAWUNGANIDZI WEMATSAMBA AYA NDI MUPARIDZI JOSEPH HOMBARUME NA MUPARIDZI ENOUCH MANGWENZI NA RABBI GEORGE BEN MEDEKIAH NEWAMWE WAKA WANDA TSANANGUDZO KUBVA KUMUNYORI CHEKUTANGA NDINOKU KWAZISAYI NERUFARO NDICHITI RUFARO NGARUWE KWAMURI, AYA MASHOKO ARI MUNE RINO BUKU AKA NYORESWA NA MADZISEKURU EDU IWE NENI ,NEKUDA KWECHAWAKA WONA MUNYIKA YEWATEMA ,ZVAWUCHA WERENGA ZVIYITIKO ZVEDI ZVAKA WONEKWA NEKUNZWIKWA NEKUBATWA NEKURAYIRA PAMUSORO PEPASI, HAKUNA CHINGA ZOPFURE APA ASI ISA MWOYO WAKO KUNA MWARI AWE MBERI KWAKO PAKUWERENGA UKU UCHAYITA RUGWARO RWE AFRIKA. AYA MASHOKO NDAKA ANYORA MUGORE 2016 MUNA SEPTEMBER NA OCTOMBER, NDICHIYEDZA KUTI TSANANGUDZO DZISA RASIKE KUYITIRA WACHA WUYA ,IRI BUKU HARINA MURIDZI NDERE MUNHU MUTEMA WESE NEKUTI NDIYE AKA WINGWA NA BABA KUYITIRA KUTI AGO ZIWA JEHOVA KUTI ANE MUTSA PANESU SAKA MASHOKO ANGAWE ANO RWADZA KANA KUFADZA ASI ZVESE IZVI NDOTI NDAKAZVITADZA NEKUZVIGONA MUZITA RAKE AKA WONEKWA. SEZVO ZVAKA POROFITWA PAMUSORO PE AFRIKA NA MUPOROFITI ISAIAH 19;19. NDINGAAWANZE ASI NDINOTI ZVINZWIRE WEGA PACHENA NEAYA MASHOKO NDINOTI RUNYARARO NGARUWE KWAURI AMEN.

items.title: KUPOROFITWA KWA MESSIAH
items.text:
[72] KUNE BUKU RAKA WERENGWA REZVI POROFITI ZVEKARE KARE REMA JUDAH, RAKA NYORWA KUTI BUKU RENYAYA DZEKARE RE MAJUDAH RINOTI
[73] WAMWE WA POROFITI WAKATI TAKA WONA KUCHI UYA MESSIAH WAKA BATANA WARI WAYIRI,
[74] MU PEJI 83 NDIMA YAKARE YO MUBUKU REKARE KARE RINOTI WAMWE WA POROFITI WAKATI MESSIAH ANO WUYA ASI ACHA GARA MAKUMI MANA EMA KORE (40YRS)
[75] EZRA AKATI ANOZO GARA MAZANA MANA EMA KORE (400YRS)
[76] ELIJAH NDIYE MESSIAH WEKUGUMA MUTSANANGURO NDIYE AKANZI BABA JOHANNE ZVICHI REWA TSITSI DZA MWARI KUIMBA YA KUSHI ,SAKA JESU AKATI HAKUNA MUKURU KUNE WAKA BEREKWA NE MUKADZI NE MURUME ANO KUNDA JOHANNE MUBABATIDZI ,JESU EKENGE ACHI ZIWA KUTI ELIJAH AYIZO UYA AKA ZADZWA NE TSITSI NERUSUNUNGURO RWE ZVITEMA , IYE JESU IZVO AKA BEREKWA AKANZI JOSHUA UKO NDIKO KUTI ANE TSITSI MUPONESI.
[77] TSANANGURO IDZI DZAKA WERENGWA MUSI WA 01-01-1966, TAWERENGA BUKU RA ENOCH WE CHINOMWE 1 ENOCH 77 V1,NA 25V 3 NA MAPISAREMA 18V9-11 GORE DEMA KUREWA KUTI WANHU WATEMA
[78] ENOCH 90 V 28-31, 1 ENOCH 90 V 37, ISAIAH 19 V 19 -22 ,ISAIAH 53 V 1-3 ,
[79] BUKU RINONZI JEWISH FKLORE RINOTI MA HWENDEFA AKA NYORWA MITEMO INE GUMI NA MWARI AKA PIWA MOSES NA MWARI KUTI A CHENGETWE CHIRI CHIRANGANO PAKATI PA MWARI NEMBA YA ISRAELI AKAZO PIWA MENELEKI MWANA KOMANA WA MAYI SHEBA ,WAWAKA BARA NA MAMBO SOLOMON ,IZVO MENELEK AKA PIWA BOKISI RINO YERA IRI AKA PIWAWO NEWA PIRISITI WAYI CHENGETA BOKISI IRI AKA UYA NARO MU AFRIKA CHIRI CHIPOROFITI CHEKUTAMA KWE IZWI RA MWARI KUBVA KWA JUDAH RICHI UYA KU AFRIKA,
[80] KUNE BUKU RINONZI THE SECOND ADVENT –THE ORIGIN OF THE NEW TESTAMENT DOCTRINE ,RAKA NYORWA NA T.FRANCIS GLASSON M.A.DD.PEJI 239-240 RINOTI UMAMBO HWA MESSIAH HUNO GARA MAKUMI MANA EMAKORE ,(40YRS) ASI ANTI CHRIST ANOMBO SARA ACHI ENDERERA MBERI NE BASA RAKE,
[81] TSAMBA RA 2 BARACH 30V1, RINOTI KANA NGUWA YA MESSIAH YA ZADZISWA IYE ANO DZOKERA MUMBIRI YAKE ,DUDZIRO INOTI MESSIAH ACHA DZOKERA KUDENGA ASI ANE TEMBENGE AWONEKWA PANYAMA,
[82] BARACH 73 V 1 INOTI MESSIAH KANA AWUYA ANO DEREDZA ZVINHU ZVESE ZVE PASI PANO ,IYE KANA AWE NEZERA ANO GARA PASI MURUNYARARO PACHIGARO CHAKE CHEHUMAMBO , NDIKO KUTI RUFARO RURATIDZWE NEKUZORORA KUNOZO ONEKWA,
[83] TSAMBA RA EZRA 7 V 30 RINOTI KUFA KWA MESSIAH KUNO ZOYITA SE KUFA KUNO ITA MUNHU WESE, AMEN.

items.title: RUDAYIRO MUMAZUWA A MESSIAH
items.text:
[84] MESSIAH AKANZI ANOZO YITA ZVITSVA, ZVISINA KUMBOYITWA KANA NE KUNA ADAM, ZVINO WANHU WANENGE WARI KWEARI, NEKUSADAYIRA MUZVIRO ZVESE IZVO ANENGE ACHIMISA, ACHITI KANA ATONGA MUNHU ACHITI "MUNHU UYU AKA YIPA HANDICHADI KUMUWONA" GARE GARE ONDOMUTORA ZVEMUNHU UYA.
[85] ZVINO WAMWE WANOZOTI , "KO IYE WAKAMBO ZVITAWURIREYI KUTI MUNHU UYU AKA YIPA, ZVINO AWE KUGARA NAYE SEYI ACHIDYA NAYE?" MATEO 9;11
[86] PANE IMWE NGUWA ANGA YENDE ANO TORA MUKADZI AKA YIPA ,MUROYI KANA ANO HURA ACHITI, "NGAAWUYE ANDI BIKIRE" ZVINO MUNHU ASINA RUDAYIRO ACHATI "NGENYI AKA MBOWUYA ACHITI DZIDZISA KUTI MUSAZO GARA NEWAKAYIPA KANA MUKADZI HURE, ZVINO IYE AWE KUYITA IZVI SEYIKO?, IZVI HAZVISIRI ZVA MWARI BA IZVI"
[87] PANE IMWE NZVIMBO ACHA DYA PAMWECHETE NE N'ANGA WAKA YIPA WACHATI "HAZVICHIRI ZVA MWARI BA IZVI" ACHA SVIKA PANE IMWE NZVIMBO ACHADA KUGARA NA MAMBO NE WAPFUMI NE WANHU WAKA DZIDZA , ZVINO WAKA YIPA WACHATI , "ANODA ZVAKANAKA CHETE"
[88] PANE DZIMWE NGUWA ACHA TORA CHINGWA CHEMUROMBO NECHE SHIRIKADZI OCHIDYA IYE, KANA KUPA KUNENGE AYINAZVO, KANA KUNE AKA GUTA .
[89] PANE IMWE NZVIMBO ACHA TORA MUKADZI ARI KUBIKA MUMBA MEMUMWE MU ISRAEL, ZVINO WAKAYIPA WACHATI HAPACHINA ZVAMWARI BA APA NGATI NGWAREYI!" NEKUTI ZVAKANZI ANOZO BURITSA ZVAKA WANDIKA ZVA MWARI.

items.title: TSANANGURO DZEMA TSAMBA ANO YERA TORAH
items.text:
[90] AKANGE AWAKUTORIMA MINDA ,SIMBA REKUTONGA KWAWO TINO RINZWISISA ZVAKANAKA PA HUMAMBO HWAWO HWEKUTANGA ,
[91] KUZOTI HWECHITANHATU HWAKA WAMBIRA PANA MANESU , HUKAPERA MUNA 3,500 B.C.
[92] ZVINO PYRAMID YAKA RATIDZA TSIKA NECHIMIRO CHESIMBA REKUTONGA KWE HUMAMBO HWEMA EGYPTA. ZVINO PAKU PERA KWEIYI NGUWA ,KWAYIWE NECHI MWARI CHIKURU CHE GZEH.
[93] ZVINGA FANANIDZA [ASI HAZVI SAKA PIHWA MUSI] KANA PAMAZUWA AMAMBO MANESU, PYRAMID YECHIPIRI NEYE CHITATU ZITA RA KUFU, WE HUMABO WECHINA KUNA 6,000 B.C.
[94] ZVINO IZVI TAZVI TAWURIRA KUTI MUWONE KUTI HAPANA APO AFRIKA PAYAKAMBO TUMIRWAWO MWEYA MUCHENA ,MUDZIMU UNO YERA MWEYA MUTSVENE.
[95] KUBVA MUNGUWA IYOYI WABABA WEDU WAYIWA WANAMATI WEMIDZIMU YAKAYIPA , WA BABA WENYIKA YE AFRIKA WAKANGE WACHIPIRA WANA WAWO KUMASHAYI WASINA MWARI,
[96] SAKA JEREMIAH AKATI , "INGWE HAYIPINDUKE MUMAWARA AYO , ZVAKADARO ITHOPIA [MATOPIA] HAAPINDUKE MUZVITEMA ZVAWO" JEREMIAH 13;23. ZVINO MUNA MATHEW HENRY TINO ZIWA KUTI MATOPIA AKANGE ACHIDZIIDZA KWAZVO KUTI MWARI AWA SHANYIREWO, ASI MWARI AKA RAMBA ACHIWA TUMIRA MWEYA WERUCHIWA NEKUTI NGUWA YAWO YAKANGE ISATI YASVIKA.
[97] IZVI ZVINO WONESEKA KUTI MHOSVA YEWANHU WE AFRIKA HAYISAKA WAMBA PAKUSEKA KWAKA YITA KENANI SEKURU WAKE KWETE!, NOWA PAAKANGE ACHI WAKA NGARAWA,
[98] ZVINONZI NEZVI NYORWA HAM NDIYE AKANGE ACHIPA ZVINHU ZVESE ZVISAKA CHENA ZVAKANGA ZVIRI MUNGARAWA ZVEKUDYA, AKANGE ACHI BATISWA MATSITO NEZVIRO ZVESE ZVAKANGE ZVICHINZI HAZVISAKA CHENA , [ZVINO TAWURA MHUKA DZESE DZISAKA CHENA].
[99] ZVIRO ZVESE ZVAYINZI HAZVINA KUCHENA ZVAYIPIHWA IYE KUTI AGARE NAZVO , AYIDYA PAMWE NE ZVISAKA CHENA, NAIYE AYI WERENGWA KUTI AKA SVIPA . ZVINOTI WONESA KUTI HAM HAASI MWANA WA NOWA PAKUBEREKWA PA NYAMA.
[100] SEZVO ZVAKA NYORWA KUTI , "NOWA IZVO AKANGE AWA NEMAKORE 500 ,AKAWA NEWANA WAKE SHEM HAM NA JAFTI, ZVINONZI AKA WA NEWANA WAKE , HAZVINZI AKA BEREKA NGANA ACHITEWERWA NA NGANA, ASI KUTI BADZI AKAWE NEWANA WAKE WATATU".

items.title: MESSIAH ACHA WUYA
items.text:
[115] MESSIAH AKANZI ACHA WUYA NEDI NOKUZADZISA ZVESE PAKUWUYA KWAKE, KUPFUMA NEKURURAMA. AKA SHONGA KURURAMA, ANOZO RURAMISA WANHU, ANOZO ZADZA PASI RESE NEKURURAMA.
[116] ANOZOPA WANHU HUPENYU KUTI WASAFE, ASI KUTI WAWE NENZVIMBO MUHUPENYU, ANOZO TONGA NEKURURAMA, ANO TONGA WAKA YIPA, NEKU PARADZA HUMAMBO HWE PASI RINO.
[117] ANOZO RATIDZA KUWANDIKA KWESE, PAKUWAMBA KUSIKWA KWAKA YITWA PASI, IYE AKANGE AKAGARA PACHIGARO CHA MWARI, AYINE HWUMAMBO HWEZVIRO ZVESE,
[118] KUTONGA KWESE KWAKA PIWA IYE, ANOZO PARADZA WAKAYIPA NEZVIRI MUPASI KUBVA MUMUROMO MAKE, MUMAZUWA A MESSIAH, NYIKA INOZO CHENURWA KUBVA MUZVITEMA ZVOSE.
[119] MUNGUWA YEHUMAMBO HWA MESSIAH, WANHU WAKE WANOZOWA NEHUPENYU. MU BUKU RA ENOCH 1; 52;3, MUNOTI, "WAKA SARUDZWA WANGU WANOZO MUKA, WANOZO GARA PACHIGARO CHANGU, MUMUROMO MAKE MESSIAH ANODURURA HUZIWI HWESE.
[120] NEKUWANDIKA KWESE NEZANO RA TENZI WEMUDZIMU AKAMUPA IYE AKAMU KUDZA IYE, IZWI RINOTI ANOZOMUKA ZVINO TAWURA KUTI, "MESSIAH ANOZO WONEKA ANE MUWIRI WEHUZIWI".
[121] WANHU WEHUMAMBO HWAKE WANOZO GOWERANA UKU KUZIWA, WAKA SARUDZWA WAKE, IYE ANOTI WAKA SARUDZWA WANGU, CHIGARO CHANGU. MUMUROMO MAKE ANOZO BURITSA ZANO, KUWANDIKA KWESE KWEHUNGWARU KUNOZO BUDA KUCHIBVA MUZANO RAKE.
[122] ZVINO WANHU WEHUMAMBO HWAKE KANA WAKUMU TEERERA ZVAANENGE ACHI TAWURA WANOZOWA WANGWARU [WAZIWI] WANOZOWA WAZIWI KWAZVO.
[123] WANOZOWA WAKA RURAMA,WANOZO WATONGI, [ZVAKAZARURWA 3;21] WANOZO RARAMA, WANOZO PONA MUKUFA KWECHIPIRI, WANOZOWA RUDZI RWAKA SARUDZWA WANGU, WANOZO GARA NAIYE MUHUMAMBO HWAKE.
[124] WANOZO YERA SEZVO IYE ACHIYERA, WANOZOWA NE HUPENYU HWAKA RASWA NA ADAM PAMUNDA WE EDEN, WAKA KOMBORERWA AWO WANOZO SANGANA NEMUSI IWOYO, ZVAKAZARURWA 19;9.
[125] TINO DZIIDZA KUTI ,WAKA RURAMA WAKANGE WAWONEKWA, WAKAYIPA WANOZO TONGWA NEZVITEMA ZVAWO. WANOZO BVISWA PAHOPE [HUSU] HWE PASI.
[126] ZVINO IYE AKA SARUDZWA AKANGE AGARA PACHIGARO CHAKE ANOZO WAMBA BASA RAKE REKUSARUDZA WANODA MWARI NE WASINGA MUDE. WANOMUDA WANOZO RAMBA WACHIMUDA WACHIMU TEWERA, WAKAYIPA WANOZO MUSIYA. WAMWE WACHATI NDEZVA MWARI, MWARI NGAWAKUDZWE.

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 1 - MUNHU ASINGA ZIWIKANWI, NE TSIRU YE MOMBE
items.text:
[1] PA MUGWAMBI, KWA GANDANZARA
[2] MAYI EFI WAKATI, "INI IZVO NDAKANGE NDICHIRI PAMUSHA PABABA WANGU AMUGWAMBI.
[3] PAKA SVIKA MUNHU AYIWONEKWA KUNGE MURUNGU KUCHENA GANDA RAKE.
[4] AKASVIKOTI NDIWURAYIREYI MOMBE, BABA WANGU WAKA MUWURAYIRA TSIRU REMOMBE RAKA KORA AKA RIDYA RESE ACHIYITA ZVEKUYIGOCHA YAKAPERA YOSE , APEDZA KUDYA AKA TORA MAPFUPA NDOKUBVA AACHERERA PASI KWAKUFUTSIRA.
[5] AKABVA AWONEKA NDOBVA AYENDA NE KUMABVAZUWA ,ZVESE IZVI ZVAKAYITIKA ZUWA RIMWE ,ACHANGOYENDA WABEREKI WANGU WAKA TANGA KUVHUNZANA WACHITI KO IYE MUNHU UYU NDIYANIKO UYE ANOBVEPIKO?
[6] ZVAABVA PANO ATI ARI KUYENDEPI? WAKABVUNZANA MIBVUNZO YESE IYI ASI YAKASHAYA AKAPINDURA NEKUTI AKANGE ATO YENDA.
[7] AYENDA KUDARO MUSI IWOWO KWAKABVA KWA NAYA MVURA ZHINJI KWAZVO INO TYISA , TSOKA DZAKE DZESE DZIKA DZIMIKA.
[8] MAYI EFI WAKATI TAKAZO GARA HEDU KUSVIKA NDAZOWANIKWA MUMUSHA MEKWAMASEDZA NA BABA JACK.
[9] KUSVIKIRA MURUME WANGU ASUNGWA ACHINZI HAANA KUTERA MUTERO AKAYENDESWA KWARUSAPE KUJERI.
[10] NYAMBISWA PAKANGE PAKANGANISWA ARI MUNIN'I NA WAWO AKANGE ASINA KUTEERA MUTERO
[11] NDAKANGE NDANAMBA PAMUWIRI PANE MWEDZI MITATU, MAKACHITANGA KUTAMBA ZVINO TYISA ZVIKANDI SHAMISA KWAZVO.
[12] INI NDAKASARA HANGU PAMUSHA NAAMWENE WANGU. KUZOTI MUMWE MUSI NDAKATORA CHIRONGO, NDIKA YENDA KUTSIME KUNO CHERA MVURA .
[13] ZVINO NDIRI MUNZIRA NDAKA WONA CHISHAMISO, NDAKAWONA JIRA RAKA REMBERA PANZIRA KUBVA MUDENGA. NDICHIRI KUSHAMISWA NAYIZVOZVO,
[14] NDAKANZWA IZWI RAYIBUDA MUJIRA, RAWAKUDAYIDZA RICHITI ,"EFI EFI EFI " KATATU, IPAPO NDAKADA KUTIZA NDIKATADZA NEKUTYA.
[15] NDAKAZO DAYIDZWA ZVE NDIKADAYIRA KUTI SHEWE, NDADAYIRA IZWI RAKATI BATA JIRA IRI ,NDAKABATA JIRA IZWI RIKATI NAMATA MUNAMATO WAJESO, INI NDIKATI HANDIGONI.
[16] IZWI RIKATI ITA "BABA WEDU WARIKO KUDENGA ,ZITA RENYU NGARIKUDZWE, UMAMBO HWENYU NGAWU SVIKE, KUDA KWENYU KUYITWE PASI PANO SEKUDENGA, MUTIPEWO SADZA REDU REMISI YOSE, MUTI SUNUNGUREYIWO MUKUTADZA KWEDU ,SEZVO TICHISUNUNGURA WANO TITADZIRA, MUSATI TUNGAMIDZIREWO MUKURUNZIRWA, ASI MUTIPONESE MUKUYIPA, SEZVO HUMAMBO HURI HWENYU ,NEMASIMBA NEKUTUNHIDZWA ZVIGARE ZVAKA DARO NEKUSINGAPERI AMEN.

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 2 - MAYI EFI WANO WONA MAPIPI: KWA TANDI
items.text:
[1] IZVO NDAKA DZIDZISWA KUDARO KUTYA KWAKABVA KWA PERA NDAKAZO SIMUDZWA MUDENGA KATATU, NDAKANGO BATA JIRA IRI IZWI RICHITI MUZITA RA BABA NERE MURUMBWANA NERE MUDZIMU UNOYERA PAKAZONZI AMEN.
[2] KUSIMUDZWA UKO KWAKAYITA NHANO CHAYIYO KUKWIRA MUDENGA. NDO DZIKISWA ZVE NDO SIMUDZWA ZVE ZVIKAYITA RUTATU.
[3] ZVAPERA IZVOZVO JIRA RAKABVA RAKWIRA KUDENGA ZVISHOMA NEZVISHOMA KUDAKARA NDISISARIWONE, JIRA RACHO RAYIWE RINE MHANDO NHATU, SEZVAKAYITA MURARAWUNGU.
[4] NDAKAZO TORA CHIRONGO NDIKA DZOKERA KUMBA NDISINA MVURA,
[5] ZVANDAKA SVIKA PAMBA AMWENE WANGU WAKANDI VHUNZA WACHITI KO MADZOKA MUSINA MVURA MARWARA HERE? ZVAMANGOTI UNERERE.
[6] NDIKAWA PINDURA NDICHITI AMAYI HAMHENO KUTI NDICHAPONA HERE. NEKUTI KWANDAYENDA NDASANGANA NECHIRO CHANDI TYISA KWAZVO.
[7] NDAKAWA TSANANGURIRA ZVESE ZVANDAKA WONA NEZVAKA YITIKA NEZVAKATAWURWA.
[8] TAKA GARA HEDU NAWAMWENE WANGU PAMUSHA KUZOTI MUMWE MUSI NDIRI MUMUNDA MENZUNGU, NDAKA KARUKA KWASVIKA NGIROZI YAKABATA DISHI.
[9] RAYI PENYA KWAZVO ,IKATI EFI EFI EFI TAMBIRA MWANA UYU ANOYERA, NDIKAWONA ZVEDI MWANA AKANGE ARI MUDISHI AKA CHENA SEMWANA WEMURNGU. NDIKA TAMBIRA ,
[10] NDICHINGO TAMBIRA KUDARO DISHI NEMWANA ZVAKABVA ZVANYANGADIKA, NDIKA SHAMISWA NEZVAKA YITIKA IZVI.
[11] NEKUTI HAPANA CHAKA SARA IYO NGIROZI NEMWANA ZVESE ZVAKA NYANGARIKA SEKUBWAYIRA KWEZISO.
[12] MUWIRI WANGU WESE WAKA ZARA CHANDO KUNGE NDIRI MUDZIWA RECHANDO, NDAKA KWANISA CHETE KUDZOKERA KUMBA.

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 3 - MAYI EFI WANO SHANYIRA WA JACK KUJERI KWA RUSAPE
items.text:
[1] NDAKA SVIKA PAMBA AMWENE WANGU WAKA SHAMISWA NECHIMIRO CHAKANGE NDAWE ,WAKA SVIKOTI CHINYI! ZVAYITA SEYIKO? MARWARA HERE?
[2] INI NDIKATI NDIRI KUWONA KUTI NDICHAFA CHETE NEZVIRO ZVIRI KUYITIKA PANDIRI MUMUSHA MUNO!
[3] NDAKAWA TSANANGURIRA NYAYA YESE NDAPEDZA KUWA TSANANGURIRA NDAKAZOWA KUMBIRA NDICHITI MHAYI PANE ZVIRI KUYITIKA IZVI, MHAYI NDAYI KUMBIRAWO KUTI KANA ZVICHI BVIRA NDINO WUDZAWO MURUME WANGU KUJERI KWEARI.
[4] NGUWA YAKASVIKA KUTI NDINO WONA MURUME WANGU KWA RUSAPE TIKA ENDA ,IZVO TAKA SVIKA TAKA KUMBIRA MVUMO YEKUWONANA KUWAKURU WEJERI, TIKAZO BVUMIRWA HEDU.
[5] IZVO TAKA ONANA NEMURUME WANGU IPAPO ZVE PAKAYITA CHIMWE CHISHAMISO ZVE! NDAKA KWAZISANA NEMURUME MUDUMBU MANGU MUKA TAMBA ZVINE SIMBA ZVAKANDI VHUNDUTSA.
[6] MURUME WANGU AKAZO NDIWUDZA KUTI MUDZIMAYI WANGU INI NDIRI KUNO HANGU, ASI NDINE HOPE DZA NDAKA ROTA NDAKA KWAUYA MUMWE MUNHU AKA SVIKO NDIUDZA KUTI "NDIWE JACK WANDA YINGA PANO"
[7] NDAKA TUMWA KUZOKUWUDZA KUTI, MUKADZI WAKO ASAZO WUDZE WAPIRISITA WEROMA, PAZVINHU ZVIRI KUYITIKA KANA ZVINHU ZVAARI KUWONA.
[8] NEKUTI ZVIKA ZIWIKANWA CHETE WACHAMUWURAYA.
[9] MURUME WANGU PAAKANGO PEDZA KUTAWURA ,INI NDAKABVA NDATANGA KUWASUMA NDICHITI HONGU NDANZWA ZVAMA NDITAWURIRA ,ASI IDI NDATAMBUDZIKA INI.
[10] IZVOZVI ZVAMANDI CHINGAMIDZA MUNHUMBU MANGU MATAMBA ZVATONDI VHUNDUTSA!
[11] KANA KUWUYA KWANDATOITA KUNO NDAWUYA HANGU KUTI NDIKU SUMEYI ZVINHU ZVIRI KUNDI NETSA, NDAKA CHITANGA KUTSANANGURIRA MURUME WANGU NYAYA YESE YEJIRA NEZVESE ZVAKAYITIKA NEZVANDAKA WUDZWA ,NDAPEDZA NDAKA PINDA ZVE KUMUTSANGURIRA NEZVE NGIROZI YAKANDI TAMBIDZA DISHI RAIWE NEMWANA MUKATI.
[12] NDAPEDZA KUMU TSANANGURIRA, MURUME WANGU AKATI MUKADZI WANGU ZVESE IZVO ZVAWATAWURA NDAZVINZWA NENIWO HANDIZIWI KUTI CHII CHAWEPO ,CHINYI ,ASI ZVINO CHIRI KUNDI TYISA ISHOKO RANDAKA KOHOMEDZWA RAKANZI, 'ZVOSE ZVICHAYITIKA NGAZVIWE ZVEDU TEGA UNGAZO WURAYIWE! IWE!'
[13] INI NDAKAZO WONEKA HANGU MURUME NDICHITI "NDAWE KUDZOKERA KUMUSHA CHISARAYI HENYU" IYE AKATI, "NDATENDA MUDZIMAYI WANGU, FAMBA HAKO ZVAKA NAKA UNO NDIKWAZISIRA WANHU WESE KUMUSHA".
[14] ASI USA KANGANWI CHIRO CHANDA KUWUDZA NDAPOTA HANGU NEKUTI UNGA WURAYIWA.
[15] NDAKANO SVIKA HANGU KUMUSHA ZVAKANAKA, ASI NDAYI NDICHI ROTA SHIRI CHENA DZAKA WANDA DZICHI BHURURUKA DZIRI PAMUSORO PANGU, DZICHIYITA SEDZINGANDI ROWA NEMAPAPIRO ADZO.
[16] NDAYIGARO ROTA HOPE NDICHIWONA MUNHU ANE ZVICHENA ACHIDZIKA PAMHEPO IYE AKABATA TAMBO INE MHANDO NHATU DZAKAYITA SEMURARAWUNGU, IYO TAMBO YAYI DZIKISWA ICHI BAYA PADUMBU RANGU ICHI KWIDZWAZVE KUDENGA ZVICHINGODARO.
[17] IDZI HOPE NDAYIDZI ROTA NGUWA DZAKA WANDA NDIYINE NHUMBU YEMWANA UYU.

items.title: KUBEREKWA KWA BABA JOHANNE - 01-10-1914
items.text:
[18] MURUME WANGU AKAZOPEDZA HAKE KUPIKA JERI, APEDZA KUDARO AKAGARA NGUWA ARIKO NEKUTI KWAKANGE KWAMUKA DENDA RENHOMBA SAKA WANHU WAYISA BVUMIDZWA KUFAMBA FAMBA NYIKA YESE. AKAZO DZOKA PAMUSHA TIKA GARA HEDU KUSVIKA NDAZO SUNUNGUKA.
[19] KUZOTI URI MUSI WE CHINA ,CHISHAMISO CHAKA YITIKA PAKUSUNUNGUKA ,INI NDAKA RWARA KUTI NDISUNUNGUKE KUKA WUYA MBUYA KUTI DZINDI SUNUNGUTSE, NHUMBU YAKABVA YAREGERA KURWADZA, NDIKATO SWERA NDAKUTO SHANDA HANGU.
[20] MBUYA DZESE DZIKA PARARA DZIKANDI SIYA DZATI "KANA WAZO RWARA UNO TUMA MUNHU TINOWUYA ,NDAKA SWERA DAKARA ZUWA RIDOKE.
[21] NDAKAZOTI MUNGUWA DZERUVHUNZA WAYENI, NDAKA VHUNDUKA KUTINHIRA KWAKABVA KUMABVA ZUWA NYIKA YAKA NDENGENDEKA ZVINO TYISA KUVHUNDUKA IKO KO NDIKO KUSUNUNGUKA KWANDA KAYITA.
[22] WANHU VAKAZONZWA KUTI NDATOWE NEMWANA MUKOMANA, NDAKA SUNUNGUKA MUMWEDZI WAGUMIGURU UCHANGOTANGA KUGARA MUGORE REHONDO YE JERIMANI ,HONDO YA HITIRA YEKUTANGA.
[23] WANHU WAYITI IHONDO YEPASI ROSE! MUGORE IRORO TAKA TAMBUDZIKA KWAZVO ZVICHINZI HITIRA ARI KUDA KUPARADZA PASI ROSE, HONDO YACHO MUNOYIZIWA YAKA PEDZA MAKORE ICHINGO RWIWA.
[24] KWAKAZO WUYA ZVE DENDA REMUKONDOMBERA, SHONHIWA MWANA WANGU AKA KURA AYI TSANHI.
[28] KWAKATI NEGORE IRORO RA 1914 MUSI WA 01-10-1914. DZAKANGE DZIRI NGUWA DZERUVHUNZA WAYENI, NGUWA DZE 7 OCLOKO (7P.M.) NYIKA YAKA TANGA KUPENYA YESE ,TIKANZWA DENGA RAWE KUTINHIRA SEKUNO FAMBA FLYINGMACHINE (NDEGE)
[29] PASI RAKA GEDA-GEDA RICHI TINHIRA SE ZVINOYITA MOTO-BIKE KANA ICHI FAMBA ,DZIMBA DZEWANHU DZIKA TENDERERA, MAKABATI AYIWWE MUDZIMBA DZE WANHU AKA ZUNGUZIKA MAPURETI NEMA KAPU AKA DONHERA PASI ,
[30] MIKATE YEKUBIKIRA SADZA YAKANGE IRI PA MOTO YAYI ZUNGUZIKA KUYITA SEYINO TAMBA ICHI SVETUKIRA MUDENGA NE MAPFIHWA ACHITAMBA,
[31] WANHU WAKANGE WARI KUDYA SADZA RAYI TAMBAWO ,NDIRO NE MBIYA DZAKANGE DZAYI TAMBAWO NAIDZOWO, NEMUNHU AYI TAMBAWO APO AYINGE AGERE PASI KUDARO, WAKANGE URI MUSI WE CHINA MANHERU, MUSI WA 01-10-1914.
[32] MHUKA DZESANGO DZAKA CHEMA DZIKAWUYA MUMISHA MEWANHU ,SHIRI DZEMUMHEPO DZIKARIRAWO, MOMBE ,HWAYI ,MBUDZI, HUKU ,ZVESE ZVIKA CHEMA ZVIPFUWO ZVESE ZVAKA CHEMA KWAZVO,

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 10 - KUZVODZWA KWAKA YITWA TENZI KUDENGA
items.text:
[1] NDIPO TAKANZWA IZWI RAWA KUTAWURA KUDENGA RICHITI SIXPENCE SIXPENCE SIXPENCE KATATU ISU TIKANZWA IZWI RAKE RAKUDAYIRA RIRI KUDENGA ASI MUTUMBI WAKE TAKANGE TIYINAWO MUMBA MATAKANGA TIRI ,IYE AKA DAYIRA ACHITI BABA IZWI RAKE RIRI KUDENGA AKA VHUNZWA KUTI WAURI KUTI BABA NDIYANI SIXPENCE, AKATI NDIMI TENZI.
[2] IWAYI NEMUTSA KUNENI, NDIYITIREYIWO MUTSA TENZI , NDIYITIREYI HENYU MUTSA ,
[3] IZWI RIKATI CHINYI CHAWURI KUTI CHIWAYI NE MUTSA KUNENI IWAYI HENYU NEMUTSA KUNENI.
[4] IYE AKATI NDIMI TENZI ,IZWI RIYA RIKATI IMBA UCHITI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU HA HA HALELUJAH, IZWI RIKATI UNO ZIWA HERE MAZUWA AYO AWAKARWARA IWE WAYI RWARIRA ZVITADZO ZVAKO, IZVO WAYINDI TADZIRA PAKATI PE NYANZA YANGU
[5] SIXPENCE AKATI TENZI NDIYITIREYI MUTSA KUTI NDIDZOKERE PAKATI PECHITA CHIRI PASI PE TSOKA DZANGU.
[6] IZWI RIKATI UNE NHARO HERE NDINODA KUTI UWUYE KUNO KUZOYITA BASA RANGU, CHINGUWANA TAKANZWA MWEYA WAKE WADZOKERA MUCHITUNHA CHAKE SIXPENCE ACHITI GIRIGWIRI KUFEMA , SIXPENCE AKABVA AMUKA AKAGARA
[7] AKATI NDIBATEYIWO IYE AKATI HAMA NESHAMWARI MUGERE MURIMA MUPASI KUDAYI RIMA GURU KUDAYI INI NDANGA NDICHITO TAWURA NA BABA IZVO ZVIKANZI HANDI ZIWI KUTI NDINGA YITE SEYIKO KUTI HAMA NE SHAMWARI DZANGU CHIRO ICHO NDANZWA.
[14] TAKABVA TAYIMBA BABA WAKABVA WAMUKA, WAMUKA KUDARO WAKA TAWURA WUDZAMI MAZWI MAKURU WACHITI NDIWO MASHOKO ANDANO WUDZWA NA BABA WANGU KUDENGA.
[15] IZWI RIKATI "CHITA CHESE CHENGIROZI CHIRI KUNO DZINO KUTEWERA HAWUSI WEGA BA INI NDINEWE MAZUWA ESE AWURI MUNE IRI PASI HAPANA CHIRO CHE GOMBA RAKA DZAMA CHINO KUBATA.
[17] WANHU WARI PASI NGAWA CHIREGA KUKUDAYIDZA KUTI SIXPENCE NHASI IWE WAKUDZWA KUNO.
[20] NEWARI MUPASI WESE NGAWA KUDAYIDZE KUTI BABA JOHANNE.
[21] IWE UGADZIRE NZIRA DZANGU DAKARA PAKUGUMA KWEIRI PASI, IWE UNO TERERA MUNHU WESE MUKURU KANA MUDIKI UYE UREMEKEDZE MUNHU WESE.

items.title: GUMI REMUTEMO - MITEMO GUMI
items.text:
[25] (1) IZWI RIKATI, "USAWE NEWAMWWE WAMWARI KUNZE KWANGU" IYE AKA PINDURA ACHITI, "TENZI CHIWAYI NE MUTSA PANESU KUTI TIDZORERE MWOYO YEDU KUTI TICHENGETE GUMI REMUTEMO".
[26] (2) IZWI RIKATI, USA ZVIYITIRE MUFANANIDZO WAKA WEZWA KANA CHAKA FANANA ZVIRI KUDENGA KUMUSORO , KANA NEZVIRI PANYIKA PASI KANA NEZVIRI MUMVURA PASI PESE" IYE AKA PINDURA ACHITI, "TENZI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU KUTI MUDZORERE MWOYO YEDU KUTI ICHENGETE GUMI REMUTEMO".
[27] (3) IZWI RIKATI, "USA DAYIDZE ZITA RA TENZI MWARI WAKO PASINA ,NEKUTI TENZI HAANGA REGI KUPA MHOSVA ANO REWA ZITA RAKE PASINA". IYE AKA PINDURA ACHITI, "TENZI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU KUTI TI DZORERE MWOYO YEDU KUTI ICHENGETE GUMI REMUTEMO.
[28] (4) IZWI RIKATI, "TONDERA ZUWA RE SABBATA URI YERESE" IYE AKA PINDURA ACHITI, "TENZI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU KUTI TIDZORERE MWOYO YEDU KUTI ICHENGETE GUMI REMUTEMO".
[29] (5) IZWI RIKATI, "KUDZA BABA NA AMAYI WAKO KUTI MAZUWA AKO AWE MAZHINJI PANYIKA IYO UNO PIWA NA JEHOVA MWARI WAKO" IYE AKA PINDURA ACHITI, "TENZI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU KUTI TIDZORERE MWOYO YEDU KUTI ICHENGETE GUMI REMUTEMO"
[30] (6) IZWI RIKATI, "USA WURAYA" IYE AKA PINDURA ACHITI, "TENZI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU KUTI TIDZORERE MWOYO YEDU KUTI ICHENGETE GUMI REMUTEMO"
[31] (7) IZWI RIKATI, "USAYITA HWUPOMBWE" IYE AKA PINDURA ACHITI, "TENZI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU KUTI TIDZORERE MWOYO YEDU KUTI ICHENGETE GUMI REMUTEMO"
[32] (8) IZWI RIKATI, "USABE" IYE AKA PINDURA ACHITI, "TENZI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU KUTI TIDZORERE MWOYO YEDU KUTI ICHENGETE GUMI REMUTEMO"
[33] (9) IZWI RIKATI, "USAYITA HWUMBOWO HWEMANYEPO KUHAMA YAKO" IYE AKA PINDURA ACHITI, "TENZI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU KUTI MUDZORERE MWOYO YEDU KUTI ICHENGETE GUMI REMUTEMO"
[34] (10) IZWI RIKATI, "USA CHIWE IMBA YE HAMA YAKO KANA MUKADZI WAKE ,KANA MURANDA KADZI WAKE, KANA CHESE CHE HAMA YAKO" IYE AKA PINDURA ACHITI, "TENZI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU KUTI MUDZORERE MWOYO YEDU KUTI ICHENGETE GUMI REMUTEMO"

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 11 - KUKWIRA KWA TENZI MUGOMO REMARIMBA
items.text:
[1] IZWI RIKATI "CHESE ICHO UNO TAWURA URI PASI INI KUNO NDINENGE NDAKA TERERA NDAKA TARIRA NDIRI KUNO. IZWI RIKATI IMBA UCHITI FAMBAYI WATENDI MUHONDO YEDU, MUCHINJIKO WA TENZI URI MBERI".
[2] IZWI RIKATI "IMBA UCHITI NYENYEDZI YA MWARI BABA INO BVISA ZVAKAYIPA ZVE PASI CHIWAYI NEMUTSA PANESU HA HA HA HALELUJAH"
[14] "IZWAYI IMI MESE MASWIKA PANO INI NDAKA TUMWA NA BABA WANGU KUTI NDICHENJEDZE PASI RESE RIZIWE KUTI HASHA DZA TENZI DZIRI KUTEWERA SHURE KWANGU,
[15] ZVINO WANODA KUPONA PAZUWA REHASHA DZA TENZI, ITYAYI MWARI MUMUPE MBIRI MUMURUMBIDZE MUNAMATE IYE AKA SIKA DENGA NEPASI,
[16] RASAYI MITI YENYU ARI MAKONA ENYU, AMUNO WIMBA NAWO MUNAMATE MWARI MUPENYU RASAYI TSIKA DZENYU DZESE DZEHUROYI , UTSINYE , KUPINGA MISHA NEMA DUWISI,
[17] INZWAYI DAYI MAPINDUKA MAREGERA TSIKA DZESE DZAKA YIPA INI NDAKA TUMWA KUTI NDIKUPEYI HUPENYU HUSINGA GUMI KANA MADAYIRA KUNA BABA WANGU.
[18] MHURI DZENYU DZESE DZICHA PONA PASINA MAKWENZI ,MURWERE ANO PONA NE KUTURIKWA MAWOKO PAMUSORO ACHI SUMWA KUNA MWARI.
[19] INZWAYI WANASIKANA WENYU WACHA PONA SEMBUDZI ,NDIYANI AKAMBO RIRITIRA MBUDZI KUTI IKWANISE KUZVARA NERUBATSIRO RWE MISHONGA?
[20] ZVIKANZI NDIZVO ZVANDA WUYA NAZVO KUMHURI DZENYU KANA MADAYIRA KUNA BABA WANGU, NDAKA TUMWA KUNEMI WANHU WATEMA.
[21] INZWAYI NDAKA TUMWA KUTI MUBUDE MUDIMA REMADIMA MAMURI KUGARA.

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 12 - ISHE CHIWERO
items.text:
[1] ISHE CHIWERO AKA PIKIDZANA NA BABA JOHANNE AKATI IWE URI KUTI WAKA TUMWA NA MWARI, KANA WAKA TUMWA ENDA MUCHI NGODO UMO TIWONE KANA UKANO MUDZOKA. ISHE AKA DARO NEKUTI MUCHINGODO MAYISA ENDWA NE ANO DZOKA , VAMWE WAYI DZOKA WAWA KUPENGA MAYIWE NEMA DZIMUDZANGARA NEZVI SHAMISO ZVIZHINJI ZVAYI YITIKA MO, MAYI YERA KUKWIRWA NEWANHU.
[2] BABA JOHANNE WAKATI NGATI YENDEYIMO TAKA KWIRA MUCHINGONDO TIKA PEDZA SVONDO TIRIMO HOSSANA ACHI GUTA ,HOSSANA AKA YIMBWA ZVIKANZI NA BABA JOHANNE VHIKI RAKWANA TIRI MUNO ZVAKWANA NGATICHI BURUKAYI HEDU,
[3] IZVO TENGE TABURUKA HOSSANA AKA SARA ACHIRIRA MUCHINGONDO ZVIKA SHAMISA MUNHU WESE KUTI WANHU WABURUKA ASI MUGOMO MUCHIRI KUNGO YIMBWA SEYIKO?
[4] ISHE CHIWERO AKAZOTO ZVEDI WAKA TUMWA JOHANNE WAKA TUMWA ZVEDI.

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 13 - MANYAMWEDA
items.text:
[1] WANHU WATEMA MURI KUBATWA KUMESO NEMA CHECHI EWARUNGU HAPANA HWUMWARI HWAWARI KUKUDZIDZISAYI
[2] NEKUTI WAPIRISITI WAWO WARI KUKUPARIDZIRAYI WAYINE NYANGA DZAWO MUHOMWE NE PFUTI DZAWO ASI WANENGE WAKA BATA BHAYIBHERI MUMA WOKO.
[3] ZVINO INI NDAKANZI NDIKU DZIDZISEYI NZIRA INONO KUSVITSAYI KUDENGA KUNA BABA WANGU, NDAWUYA NEHUPENYU HUSINGA TENGWI NEMARI KANA NECHIPFUYO NDIRI KUTI MUREGERE ZVESE ZVEHU N'ANGA KANI MUNHU ANO PONA NEKU NAMATIRWA .
[4] KWAKA NAMATA WANHU WA ZHINJI WAYI RWARA WAYIBVA WANGO PONA IPAPO, WAYI NETSWA NEMA SHAYI WAIBVA WANGO PONA NEKUTI MADHIMONI AYINGO PUTSIKA EGA ACHI CHEMA OYENDA MUNHU OSARA NEMUFARO MUKURU.
[8] NDIPO BABA AKAITA BIRA RAWO REKURARIRA WA CHIRAIRA WANHU ZVE IZWI RA MWARI, MATAURIRO ARO NE ZVERINODA KUWANHU KUSVIKIRA WANHU WAKAZIWA KUTI: NDIMUTUMWA WAKATUMWA NA MWARI. NDIPO IYE BABA JOHANNE AKATI: ZVANZI NA BABA WANGU RASAYI MABHAYIBHERI MUSA AWERENGE.MUSAUYE NE MARI PAMASOWE,
[9] BABA WANGU WATI: NDICHENGETE ZUWA RE CHISI NGEKUTI MUNYIKA INO; WAYICHENGETA ZUWA RECHISHANU. NDIPO PAYIWANIKA WANHU WAKAUNGANA. ZVAKANZI NDIRO ZUWA UCHAFAMBIRA WANHU UCHIWAWUDZA IZVO NDAKAKURAIRA.

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 16 - KUSANGANA KWA TENZI NEMA BISHOP MAKURU
items.text:
[1] BABA JOHANNE IZVO WAKA SANGANISWA NEWAKURU WE MACHACHI ,PAYIWE NEMA BISHOP MASHANU, WAPISITI WANOMWE NE WAMWE WAKURU WEMACHECHI NE MUKURU WEHURUMHENDE WAKANGE WARIPOWO
[2] IWO WAKATI CHIGADZIRA NZIRA ITSVA YAWA KATI WAKA TUMWA NA MWARI, TINZWE , WAKANDI VHUNZA KUTI KO IWE WAKANGE URI MUTUNGAMIRIR WE CHECHI YIPIKO?
[3] NDIPO NDAKA PINDURA NDICHITI INI NDIRI NUTUNGAMIRIRI WE PASI RESE , MUDZIDZISI WE PASI RESE.
[4] NDIRI KUTI WANHU WAREGERE HUROYI WARASE NYANGA DZAWO MAKONA AWO WANAMATE KUNA MWARI, WADANANE MUMWE NE MUMWE, RASAYI MISHONGA NEKUTI PASI RAAKU GUMA.
[5] IWO WAKA PINDURA WACHITI KANA NESU TIRI KUTAWURA KUTI WANHU WANO FANIRA KU BABATIDZWA WAREGERE KUNYANGADZA PANYIKA, WAPINDURA KUDARO.
[14] BABA JOHANNE WAKATI KUTI MUCHIDA KUNDI WAKIRA CHECHI ,NDINODA KUTI CHECHI RIWAKWE ZVAKADAYI, KANA MWANA ABARWA NHASI IMI MANGOWAMBA KUWAKA CHECHI YACHO PAKUPEDZA KWENYU KUYI WAKA CHECHI YACHO NE MWANA UYA WO ANENGE AWE HARAWA AWA KUFAMBA NEMUDONZVO
[15] WAKA BVUNZA KUTI I CHECHI RUDZIYI INGA WAKWE NE NGUWA YAKA REBA KUDARO? KUTENDERERA KUWAKA BEDZI MUNHU ANO CHEMBERA ?
[16] BABA JOHANNE WAKA PINDURA WACHITI ZVINO REWA KUTI INI HANDI WAKIRWI CHECHI ,CHECHI YANGU I GWENGA ,ZVICHI DURIRA KUTI PASI RESE! CHECHI YANGU IPASI RESE.

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 17 - KUSVIKA KWA BABA PA RUWUNZE
items.text:
[1] BABA JOHANNE HAWANA KUYITA KUDA KWE MUNHU ASI KUDA KWA MWARI, BABA WAKANO KWIRA CHIKOMO CHINONZI RIWUNZE.
[2] WAKA YIMBA WARIMO WANHU WAKA KOTONOKA WACHI WUYA KUZOWONA .
[3] TENZI WAKA RAYIRA WANHU WESE WAKENGE WA SVIKA IPAPO KUTI MWARI WAKA SIKA DENGA NEPASI NDIYE AKANDI TUMA KUNEMI WANHU WATEMA.
[4] NDAKA TUMWA KUTI NDIKU WUDZEYI KUTI MURASE MAKWENZI ARI MAKONA DZI NYANGA ZVIKWAMBO. MURASE HUROYI HWESE MUREGERE NDUDZI DZOSE DZE HUTSINYE.
[5] MUYITIRANE RUDO, IZVI ZVIGODZE MUPFUNGWA DZENYU MEGA MUSINGA TSVAKI, KUDZIDZISWA NEWACHENA, ASI MUTERERE MAZWI IWAYA ANDAKA TUMWA KUTI NDIKU DZIDZISEYI,
[6] MUKA NDINZWA WARWERE WENYU WESE WACHA PONA KANA DZINGOZI DZICHAPERA NDAWUYA NERUGARE UYE NEHUPENYU HUSINGA GUMI.
[7] SAKA NDIRI KUTI ITYAYI MWARI MUMUPE MBIRI IYE AKA SIKA DENGA NE PASI NEMASIPITI EMVURA.

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 18 - SIMBA RA MWARI RAKA WONEKWA PA CHINYAMATAMBA
items.text:
[1] IZVO WANHU WAKA SARA HAWO NA BABA JOHANNE. BABA JOHANNE WAKAWA DZIDZISA SEKU DZIDZISA KWAWAYINGO YITA , ZVIKURU BABA JOHANNE WAYI RAMBIDZA HUTSINYE, HUMBAVHA, HUROYI, HUN'ANGA, KUBATA CHIBHARO, BABA JOHANNE WAYITI WANHU WANE TSIKA DZESE IDZI NDIWO WANO PARADZWA NE HASHA DZA MWARI PASINA TSITSI,
[2] BABA JOHANNE WAYI KURU DZIRA RUDO CHIWE CHINHU CHINO KUDZWA ,MUWA TENDI
[3] WAKA RAYIRA WANHU KUTI "NHASI TESE TINO FANIRA KUNAMATA, MUNAMATO WENGUWA DZE CHITATU (9.A.M.)" WANHU WESE WAKATI WAWUNGANA WAKA NAMATA HAWO BABA JOHANNE NDIWO WAKA TUNGAMIRA MUNAMATO WACHO.
[4] CHINGUWANA KWAKA TINHIRA KUNGE MVURA URI MWEYA MUTSVENE WAYIITA SERIMI RE MOTO UCHI DZIKA, WANHU WAKA ZADZWA WESE NEMUDZIMU-UNOYERA VAMWE WAKA TAWURA NE NDIMI WAMWE WACHI POROFITANA.
[9] ZVESE ZVAKA YITA MURWI ZVIKA PISWA. IPAPO CHIPOROFITI CHAKA PISA ZVEDI WANHU WACHI POROFITANA PASINA KUPOKANA, IRI SIMBA RAKA DZIKA MUWANHU ASI IWO TENZI BABA JOHANNE WEKENGE WAYINE SIMBA GURU KUDARIKA IRI NDIRO RAYIYITA ZVISHAMISO ZVIZHINJI WACHIRI WEGA.
[10] KUMUTSA WAKAFA KUSVINUDZA MAPOFU ,KUBUDA MUMAJERI KUYIMBA WARI WEGA PONZWIKWA MAZWI EWANHU WAZHINJI, WAMWE WOTI MAZWI AYIBVA MUTSVIMBO NDIYO YAYI YIMBA.

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 19 - PACHISHAYA MAVHUDZI
items.text:
[1] BABA JOHANNE MUMASHURE MEKU GADZA WABATI WE MABASA, VAMWE SHURE KWA MUVHANGERI DANIEL MUTUNHIRE ,MUKOTA AZARIA NYABANGO, MUPARIDZI ONIYASI BVUMA , MUPOROFITI SAMUEL CHINYANGA.
[13] BABA JOHANNE WAKAZO TUMA WABATI KUTI WAFAMBE WACHI PARIDZA MUMA MISHA MUNZVIMBO DZESE. KUTI WANHU WESE WATYE MWARI NEKUMUPA MBIRI, WAPINDUKE WARASE MISHONGA NE HUROYI WAREGERE ZVE HUN'ANGA NE MHANDO DZOSE DZEHUTSINYE.
[14] WAPINDUKE WANAMATE WATIZE HASHA DZA MWARI, NEKUTI PASI RAWA KUGUMA PASI RA KUPARADZWA NE MOTO WE HASHA DZA MWARI.
[15] BABA JOHANNE WAKATI MUNO DZIDZISA WANHU KUTI WA RWERE WANO PONA NE KUNAMATIRWA, HAKUNA SIMBA RECHIKWAMBO KANA NGOZI ZVINO KUWADZA WANO NAMATA.
[16] MUWA UDZE KUTI WASA PINGE MISHA YAWO KANA KUYISA MADUWISI MUMINDA YAWO, WAWUDZEYI KUTI MISHA YAWO NEMINDA YAWO ZVINO CHENGETWA NE NGIROZI DZA MWARI, KANA WANA SIKANA WAWO WACHA SUNUNGUKA SEMBUDZI WACHI BATSIRWA NE NGIROZI.
[17] CHINO DIKANWA PAKATI PAWO RUDO CHETE NGAWAWE NE RUDO WANZWIRANE TSITSI WADAYIRE KUTI NDAKA TUMWA KURUDZI RWUTEMA,
[18] NDINI NDAKANZI NDINO SUNUNGURA RWUDZI RWUTEMA.

items.title: CHITSAWUKO 20 - MASHURA AKAYITIKA PAMUSHA PA MUTUNHIRE
items.text:
[1] BABA JOHANNE WAKA SARA WARI PAMUSHA PAWA MUVHANGERI DANIEL MUTUNHIRE, KUZOTI MVURA YATURUKA BABA JOHANNE WAKAZOTI KUNE MADZIMAYI WAWA MUVHANGERI HONAYI MHAYI WANHU WAKA YENDA KUBASA RA MWARI WANONOKA KUDZOKA ZVINO IRI RATOWE ZHIZHA.
[2] TIPEYI MBEWU TIYENDE TINO RIMA KUMUNDA TICHIBVA TADJARA NEKUTI NGUWA YEKURIMA NDIYOYI.
[5] MAYI MUTUNHIRE WAKA PINDA MUHOZI WAKA BUDA NE TSWANDA YE MBEWU WAKAPA BABA JOHANNE. BIPI RAKA YITWA NA TENZI
[6] BABA JOHANNE WAKA ENDA WAKA ZARURA MOMBE KUDANGA WAKATI "JOKI MUDHONZA" AKA BUDA AKA YENDA PAIWE NEMAJOKI , MAJOKI AKA SIMUKA EGA MUDENGA AKA GARA PAMITSIPA YE MOMBE , ZVITIROBO ZVIKA PFEKERA ZVEGA PAZVI KEYI.
[7] GEJO RIKA NANAYIRA REGA RIKANO GARA PACHI REYI, CHENI DZIKA KOCHEKERA PA CHIREYI, TENZI BABA JOHANNE NDOKUTI MUSIKANA TUNGAMIRAI MBERI KWE MOMBE TIYENDE KUMUNDA.
[13] BASA RESE RICHIYITWA IRI IWO BABA JOHANNE WAKENGE WAKANGO MIRA WAKA BATA KABUKU KAWO WAKA RINGISA KUMABVA ZUWA .
[14] BUKU IRI WEKENGE WAKARI BATA NEMAWOKO MAYIRI RISINA KUZARUKA BA WACHIYITA SEMUNHU ARI KUNAMATA NECHE MOMWOYO.

He who has eaten truth will never hunger again.
